collectiondata.overview:
Best Honeymoon Packages in India – Romantic Getaways for Newlyweds

Every love story deserves the perfect beginning—and Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency, Best Tour Operator, and Best International Tour Operator, brings you the perfect escape with our specially crafted Best Honeymoon Package. From the pristine beaches of island paradises to the snow-kissed magic of mountain getaways, our tailor-made tours promise moments that will last a lifetime.

Why Choose Honeymoon Packages in India?

Diverse Destinations – Beaches, Hills, and Heritage Sites
Choose from a rich variety of romantic destinations in India—from the sun-kissed beaches of Goa and Andaman to the serene hills of Himachal Pradesh and cultural palaces of Rajasthan. You can also explore unique international destinations such as the India to Finland Tour Package or India to Egypt Tour Package for a truly unforgettable experience. Each place offers unique experiences designed to make your honeymoon unforgettable.

Customized Experiences for Couples
Our honeymoon packages in India are customizable to match your preferences, whether it’s a private candlelight dinner, spa sessions, or adventure activities. You can also combine honeymoon packages with our best family tour packages for later travel.

Affordable Options for Every Budget
We offer honeymoon packages ranging from luxury resorts to affordable stays, ensuring couples on all budgets find their perfect match without compromising on quality.

Top Honeymoon Destinations in India

Goa – Beachfront Romance and Vibrant Nightlife
Enjoy beachside resorts, sunset cruises, and lively night markets. Our Goa honeymoon package includes private dinners and optional water sports.

Himachal Pradesh – Serene Mountains and Cozy Resorts
Explore the romantic hill stations with snow-capped peaks, forest walks, and cozy fireplaces. (Internal link suggestion: [Manali honeymoon package])

Kerala – Backwaters and Luxury Houseboats
Glide through tranquil backwaters on private houseboats, complemented by Ayurvedic spa treatments and traditional performances.

Rajasthan – Royal Palaces and Desert Adventures
Experience grandeur in Jaipur or Udaipur, with camel safaris and heritage walks adding to the magic.

Andaman Islands – Secluded Beaches and Crystal Clear Waters
Relax on pristine beaches and explore coral reefs, perfect for couples seeking privacy and natural beauty.
For couples who wish to celebrate overseas, our India to Mauritius Tour Package offers the perfect tropical escape.

Popular Honeymoon Package Types

Beach Honeymoon Packages
Featuring destinations like Maldives, Goa, Andaman, and Bali honeymoon packages, where you can enjoy sun, sand, and sea.

Hill Station Honeymoon Packages
Includes packages to Manali, Kashmir, Darjeeling, and Switzerland honeymoon packages offering serene mountain escapes.

Adventure Honeymoon Packages
For thrill-seeking couples, options include desert safaris in Rajasthan, trekking in Himachal Pradesh, or water sports in Thailand honeymoon packages.

Luxury and Wellness Honeymoon Packages
Indulge in spa retreats, private villas, and fine dining experiences, especially in the Maldives honeymoon package and Kerala honeymoon packages.

What’s Included in the Best Honeymoon Packages in India?

Romantic accommodation with special arrangements like candlelight dinners
Sightseeing tours and couple-focused activities such as spa treatments or private excursions
Airport transfers and local transportation for hassle-free travel
Personalized services including surprise gifts, photography sessions, and anniversary celebrations

Tip: Always confirm inclusions and check for any optional add-ons during booking.

Best Time to Plan Your Honeymoon in India

Ideal Seasons for Different Destinations

Beaches (Goa, Andaman): November to February for pleasant weather
Hills (Manali, Kashmir): March to June and September to November for clear skies
Cultural and Heritage sites (Rajasthan): October to March for cooler temperatures

Off-Season Deals and Benefits
Travel during off-peak seasons can offer great discounts but check weather conditions, especially for hill stations.

Frequently Asked Questions About Honeymoon Packages in India

How to choose the best honeymoon package?
Consider your preferred climate, activities, and budget. Customized family tour packages and couple packages allow flexibility.

Are honeymoon packages customizable?
Yes! We offer customized honeymoon packages tailored to your preferences and special requests.

What is the average cost of a honeymoon package in India?
Costs typically range from ₹1.2 lakh to ₹5 lakh depending on destination and package inclusions.

Are Manali honeymoon packages suitable for adventure lovers?
Yes, Manali honeymoon packages include trekking, paragliding, and river rafting options.

Can I combine a Lakshadweep honeymoon package with other island destinations?
Absolutely! Lakshadweep packages can be combined with India to Mauritius Tour Package or Andaman honeymoon packages for a diverse island experience.

Are Thailand and Vietnam honeymoon packages offered?
Yes, Thailand honeymoon packages and Vietnam honeymoon packages offer exotic beach and cultural experiences perfect for couples.

How to Book the Best Honeymoon Packages in India

Trusted Travel Agencies and Online Booking Platforms
Book with reputable agencies like Travelxploria to ensure smooth transactions and authentic experiences.

Tips for Early Booking and Discounts
Plan ahead to avail early bird offers and special packages around festivals or wedding seasons.

Essential Travel Documents and Packing Tips for Couples
Carry valid ID proofs, travel insurance, and pack according to the destination climate—don’t forget essentials for beach or hill stays.

packages.overview:
• Part of Mauritius’s undeveloped east coast, 3*+ Friday Attitude hotel is nestled in the peaceful fishing village of Trou d’Eau Douce. It has a deeply relaxing atmosphere that’s ideal for a holiday with your family, friends or partner.
  • Come for the salty smell of the Indian Ocean, and the typically blue tropical sky. And come to enjoy a magnificent fine-sand beach, and to indulge in simply doing nothing, swimming or watersports. Accompanying you throughout your stay, our Family Members will provide a welcome filled with Mauritius’ famous cheerfulness.
  • Throughout your holiday, expect zero stress. Instead, the forecast is for fun and relaxation– because, here, it's Friday every day!

Welcome to the enchanting island nation of the Indian Ocean — your unforgettable Mauritius family holiday begins here!

Upon your arrival at the Mauritius airport, a Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and escort you to your resort in comfort.

After checking in, take some time to refresh and relax. Depending on your arrival time, feel free to explore the nearby surroundings at your own pace or simply unwind and soak in the serene beauty of the island.

As evening descends, delight in a delicious dinner served at the resort — a perfect time to savor local flavors and enjoy quality moments with your family. Afterward, retreat to the comfort of your room for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Once on the island, relax on pristine beaches, snorkel in vibrant lagoons, or explore hidden coves. Whether you choose to sunbathe, swim, or indulge in optional water sports, every moment is pure bliss. As the day winds down, sail back to the mainland, where your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, leaving you with sun-kissed memories of an unforgettable island escape.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.overview:
• An inspired island retreat where mind, body and spirit rejoice, JW Marriott Mauritius Resort is set against the dramatic backdrop of UNESCO World Heritage Site, Le Morne Brabant Mountain.
  • Located on the spectacular Le Morne Peninsula, this luxury resort benefits from an exceptional coastal position, with endless views across white sands, protected coral reefs and the sparkling Indian Ocean.
  • A haven for leisure, our immersive quality inspires rest and relaxation. Combining Mauritian grace and modern comfort, 169 suites offer calm sanctuary, some with direct beach access and lagoon vistas. Fostering connection, there is a rich array of activities and mindful experiences to suit all generations.
  • The island’s culinary tradition is reflected at the five dining venues, where the choice ranges from local cuisine to world-class Indian, Japanese and Pan Asian options. The resort intentionally guides you to reconnect with the natural world.

packages.overview:
• Born in an era of glamorous travel, Le Méridien believes everyone should explore the world in style. Le Méridien Île Maurice effortlessly blends style and relaxation, offering a vibrant oasis for families with 261 elegantly appointed rooms stretching along the beach.
  • Here, every age is catered to with thoughtful, immersive experiences. Younger guests are invited to explore and connect with new friends from around the world in a playful environment, while parents enjoy exclusive spaces designed for peace and quiet.
  • Family bonds are nurtured through curated activities and screen-free, digital detox programs that encourage shared moments of connection. Authentic culinary journeys and cultural discoveries further immerse families in the island’s rich heritage, offering a deeper connection to Mauritius.
  • Here, we help families disconnect from the everyday, only to reconnect with each other, crafting sophisticated, unforgettable memories that will echo long after the vacation ends.

[{"city":"Mauritius","country":"Mauritius","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981460-AdobeStock_128667384.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963981715-AdobeStock_164381882 (1).jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982299-AdobeStock_166065656.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Mauritius/Mauritius/1744963982492-AdobeStock_236139821.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Mauritius: Arrival","day_summary":"

Upon your arrival at Mauritius airport, a friendly Travelxploria representative will greet you and assist you with a smooth transfer to your resort in a private vehicle.

Once you’ve checked in, take some time to relax and rejuvenate after your journey. If time allows, you can step out to explore the nearby surroundings or simply unwind and soak in the serene beauty of the island.

As the evening unfolds, delight in a sumptuous dinner served at the resort, enjoying quality time with your family. Later, head back to your cozy room for a peaceful night’s sleep, preparing for the adventures that lie ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Your Travelxploria representativegreets you at your hotel for a seamless pick-up a hearty breakfastsetting the stage for a day in paradise.Under the guidanceof Travelxploria host, hop on a speedboatand glide across crystal-clear waters to the breathtaking Île aux Cerfs. Feel the adrenaline as you take on a thrilling tube ride, bouncing over the waves with laughter and excitement. Once on the island, relax on pristine beaches, snorkel in vibrant lagoons, or explore hidden coves. Whether you choose to sunbathe, swim, or indulge in optional water sports, every moment is pure bliss. As the day winds down, sail back to the mainland, where your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, leaving you with sun-kissed memories of an unforgettable island escape.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss journey in the vibrant and scenic city of Zurich.

  • Travel to the charming lakeside town of Lucerne by train.

  • Experience snow-covered peaks and glaciers at Mount Titlis.

  • Explore Mt. Pilatus via cableway and cogwheel train for alpine views.

  • Head to Interlaken, the adventure capital nestled between two lakes.

  • Enjoy a free day to relax or explore Interlaken at your own pace.

  • Travel to the car-free mountain village of Zermatt, home of the Matterhorn.

  • Journey to Geneva, Switzerland’s cosmopolitan lakeside city.

  • Discover Geneva’s highlights, from the Jet d’Eau to the UN headquarters.

  • Conclude your Swiss adventure and head home with lasting memories.

Whether enjoying a quiet stroll or soaking in the city’s modern charm, your unforgettable Swiss adventure begins in this vibrant and scenic destination.

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Zurich and head to the train station for a scenic journey to Lucerne. The comfortable train ride takes just under an hour, offering picturesque views of rolling hills, tranquil lakes, and charming Swiss villages. Upon arrival in Lucerne, make your way to the hotel and settle in. Spend the rest of the day exploring this postcard-perfect town nestled beside Lake Lucerne and surrounded by mountains.

Embark on a thrilling full-day Mount Titlis tour, a highlight of your Swiss adventure. From Lucerne, travel to Engelberg and ascend to Mount Titlis via a series of cable cars, including the famous rotating Rotair gondola. At the summit, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views of the Alps and experience eternal snow and glacial landscapes. Explore the Glacier Cave, cross the thrilling Cliff Walk suspension bridge, and enjoy fun snow activities like tubing or snow sledding. This unforgettable alpine experience offers an incredible mix of adventure, natural beauty, and stunning snowy vistas that will leave you mesmerized.

Pilatus tour.","day_summary":"

Begin your adventure from Lucerne with a scenic cruise across Lake Lucerne to Alpnachstad, where you board the world’s steepest cogwheel railway to reach the summit of Mt. Pilatus. Enjoy spectacular panoramic views of the Swiss Alps and surrounding lakes from the top. Take in the fresh mountain air, explore hiking trails, or relax at one of the mountaintop restaurants. Later, descend via the aerial cableway and gondolas to Kriens, then return to Lucerne. This tour perfectly blends breathtaking landscapes, exciting transport experiences, and serene alpine beauty, making it a truly memorable Swiss mountain journey.

Depart from Lucerne and embark on a picturesque train journey to Interlaken aboard the scenic Luzern–Interlaken Express. This route is part of the famous GoldenPass Line, offering breathtaking views of sparkling lakes, lush valleys, charming villages, and majestic mountain peaks. The journey takes around two hours and is a visual delight from start to finish. Upon arrival in Interlaken, nestled between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, check in to your hotel and relax. With the dramatic backdrop of the Jungfrau region, Interlaken welcomes you with its serene beauty and adventurous spirit, setting the tone for an exciting alpine experience.

Enjoy a leisurely day in Interlaken, the heart of the Bernese Oberland, surrounded by the towering peaks of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau. This day is yours to explore at your own pace—take a peaceful walk along Lake Thun or Lake Brienz, browse local shops for Swiss souvenirs, or relax in a cozy café with breathtaking alpine views. For those seeking adventure, optional activities like paragliding, a scenic Harder Kulm funicular ride, or a boat cruise on the lakes can elevate your day. Whether tranquil or thrilling, Interlaken offers the perfect balance of nature, charm, and unforgettable Swiss hospitality.

Depart Interlaken and journey to the stunning mountain village of Zermatt by train, a scenic ride that showcases some of Switzerland’s most breathtaking landscapes. The route typically involves a transfer at Visp, where you board the cogwheel train that winds its way up to car-free Zermatt. Marvel at the changing views—lush valleys, alpine meadows, and snow-capped peaks. Upon arrival, take in the crisp mountain air and the iconic Matterhorn towering in the background. Check in to your hotel and spend the rest of the day exploring this charming alpine village, known for its pristine beauty and world-class mountain experiences.

Leave the enchanting village of Zermatt and embark on a scenic train journey to Geneva, Switzerland’s cosmopolitan city by the lake. The trip begins with a descent on the cogwheel train to Visp, where you connect to a high-speed train that travels through the picturesque Rhône Valley. Enjoy views of vineyards, alpine landscapes, and charming towns along the way. As you approach Geneva, the scenery transitions to a vibrant urban skyline beside Lake Geneva. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and begin soaking in the city’s refined atmosphere, rich history, and international flair, with plenty of lakeside charm awaiting discovery.

Uncover the charm and global significance of Geneva with your Travelxploria representative, ensuring the best experience in Switzerland’s vibrant metropolis. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, journey through the city's highlights, from the majestic Jet d'Eau fountain to the enchanting Old Town, where cobbled streets lead to St. Pierre Cathedral and the historic Place du Bourg-de-Four. Delve into Geneva’s role on the world stage with a visit to the International Quarters, home to the United Nations and the Red Cross Headquarters. Stroll along the scenic lakeside promenade, admire breathtaking alpine views, and uncover hidden gems along the way. Trust Travelxploria, the best travel agency, to curate an unforgettable journey through Geneva’s history, culture, and elegance.

packages.overview:
• Begin your European journey in Switzerland’s vibrant lakeside city.

  • Enjoy alpine adventures and explore the charming town of Lucerne.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel through the scenic Alps into Italy’s fashion capital.

  • Discover the elegance and serenity of Lake Como.

  • Arrive in the enchanting city of canals.

  • Experience Venice’s magic from the water.

  • Travel to the Renaissance heart of Italy.

  • Explore Tuscany’s most iconic gems.

  • Head to the Eternal City filled with ancient wonders.

  • Walk through Rome’s legendary ruins.

  • Discover masterpieces of art and spirituality.

  • Say goodbye with memories of a lifetime.

Arrive in Zurich, Switzerland’s cosmopolitan hub nestled along the scenic banks of the Limmat River and surrounded by alpine beauty. Upon arrival at Zurich International Airport, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax and recover from your journey. If time allows, head out to explore the city’s charming old town, stylish boutiques, or enjoy a peaceful stroll along Lake Zurich. From its medieval architecture to its modern urban flair, Zurich offers a perfect blend of culture, history, and natural beauty, making it an ideal starting point for your European adventure.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Zurich, giving you the perfect opportunity to explore this sophisticated Swiss city at your own pace. Begin your day with a relaxed breakfast, then consider wandering through the charming Altstadt (Old Town), where cobbled streets, historic buildings, and boutique shops create a picturesque atmosphere. Stroll along Bahnhofstrasse, one of the world’s most exclusive shopping avenues, or relax by the serene shores of Lake Zurich. You may also choose to visit museums, such as the Swiss National Museum, or take a short hike up Uetliberg Mountain for panoramic city views. The day is yours to unwind and discover.

Travel comfortably to this iconic destination, renowned for its stunning scenery, elegant villas, and charming lakeside towns. Explore the picturesque town of Como, stroll along its quaint streets, and visit the magnificent cathedral. Enjoy a scenic boat ride on the lake, passing through beautiful towns like Bellagio or Varenna. Capture postcard-perfect views of the lake and surrounding mountains. After a day immersed in natural beauty and serene elegance, return to Milan with unforgettable memories of this idyllic retreat.

Board a high-speed train from Venice to Florence and enjoy a comfortable journey through the heart of Italy. The ride takes approximately two hours, offering scenic glimpses of the Italian countryside, rolling hills, and quaint towns along the way. As you depart the romantic canals of Venice, prepare to enter the Renaissance capital of Florence, where art, culture, and history await. Upon arrival at Florence’s Santa Maria Novella Station, make your way to the hotel for check-in. Spend the rest of the day exploring Florence’s timeless beauty, from cobbled streets to the iconic Duomo, soaking in the city’s artistic atmosphere.

Embark on an unforgettable Tuscan adventure with Travelxploria, your gateway to Italy’s most enchanting landscapes. Join our expert Travelxploria guide and best on-ground support staff as you explore the historic gems of Pisa, Siena, San Gimignano, and Chianti in a single breathtaking day. Capture the perfect photo at the Leaning Tower of Pisa, stroll through the medieval streets of Siena, and admire the grandeur of its famous Piazza del Campo. Lose yourself in the fairytale charm of San Gimignano, known for its ancient towers and artisan shops, before indulging in the rich flavors of Chianti’s world-renowned wines. From stunning architecture to rolling vineyard-covered hills, every moment is a feast for the senses. With Travelxploria, expect seamless travel, expert storytelling, and a truly immersive experience—because we don’t just plan tours, we craft unforgettable memories.

to Rome by Train ","day_summary":"

Travel from Florence to Rome aboard a high-speed train, enjoying a swift and scenic ride through the picturesque landscapes of Tuscany and Lazio. The journey takes approximately 1.5 hours, offering a comfortable and efficient way to transition from the artistic treasures of Florence to the timeless grandeur of Rome. Relax in your seat as you pass rolling hills, vineyards, and charming Italian towns. Upon arrival at Rome Termini Station, transfer to your hotel and settle in. Use the rest of the day to start exploring the Eternal City, rich with ancient ruins, Renaissance architecture, and vibrant local culture around every corner.

packages.overview:
• France – Wander through the romantic streets of Paris, marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame, and visit the historic charm of Rouen.
  • United Kingdom – Experience the royal grandeur of London, explore the medieval beauty of Durham, admire Edinburgh’s castles, and soak in the vibrant culture of Glasgow, Liverpool, and Dublin.
  • Netherlands – Discover the picturesque canals and rich artistic heritage of Amsterdam, home to Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House.
  • Belgium – Stroll through the medieval squares of Brussels and Bruges, and indulge in world-famous Belgian chocolates and waffles.
  • Germany – Explore the historic sites of Berlin, the fairytale castles of Bavaria, and the cultural vibrance of Frankfurt and Cologne.
  • Switzerland – Witness the Swiss Alps’ breathtaking beauty, visit Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and enjoy a scenic ride on the Glacier Express.
  • Italy – Step back in time with the Colosseum in Rome, explore the romantic canals of Venice, admire Florence’s Renaissance art, and relax on the stunning coastline of Amalfi.
  • Spain – Immerse in the artistic and architectural wonders of Barcelona and Madrid, experience the passion of flamenco in Seville, and soak up the sun in Costa del Sol.
  • Austria – Enjoy the imperial beauty of Vienna, the musical heritage of Salzburg, and the stunning landscapes of Innsbruck.

[{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Rome","day_summary":"

Welcome to Rome! As you arrive in the Eternal City, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. After you’ve settled in, our guide will personally meet you, sharing essential details about your journey ahead. You can also find helpful information at the hotel reception. In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, a perfect introduction to Rome’s vibrant atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets and explore a variety of restaurants, setting the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome Fiumicino Airport","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Florence","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1747246882990-AdobeStock_260554885-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289621-istockphoto-1088920100-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289665-istockphoto-1136673014-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Rome to Florence","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome","to":"Florence","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":678,"h_name":"Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Florence","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956443-2024-07-01 (2).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956518-unnamed (40).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956623-2023-01-18.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Venice","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336475-istockphoto-1200916277-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336571-istockphoto-1388018793-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336619-istockphoto-911570904-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Florence to Venice","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Venice","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Zurich to Lucerne to Zurich","day_summary":"

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paris","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976316-istockphoto-689710224-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976390-istockphoto-135034702-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976428-istockphoto-847408280-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741635794864-AdobeStock_730104594-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Strasbourgh to Paris","day_summary":"

We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":681,"h_name":"Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535200-5175-11-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535319-5175-16-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535355-unnamed (43).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Paris City Tour","day_summary":"

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise Experience","day_summary":"

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to this incredible journey. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any last-minute needs, ensuring a smooth departure. As you reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from historic landmarks to breathtaking landscapes, we hope you take home not just souvenirs, but cherished memories that will last a lifetime. Though this adventure comes to an end, the stories and moments shared will stay with you forever.

packages.package_name: European Grand Tour: From Historic Streets to Modern Sights
packages.overview:
• Arrive in the dynamic British capital and settle into your hotel.

  • Explore iconic landmarks and enjoy panoramic views from the London Eye.

  • Visit two of London’s historic and architectural treasures.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris via Eurostar.

  • Discover Parisian highlights with a river cruise and Eiffel Tower visit.

  • Admire masterpieces at the world-renowned Louvre Museum.

  • Travel to the sunny French Riviera and check in to your Nice hotel.

  • Enjoy a scenic tour of glamorous coastal towns like Cannes and Monaco.

  • Cross into Italy with a beautiful train journey to Milan.

  • Explore the fashion capital’s historic and cultural landmarks.

  • Say goodbye to Europe with lasting memories of your incredible journey.

Arrive in the vibrant city of London, a captivating blend of royal heritage, modern sophistication, and timeless charm. Upon arrival at the airport, you’ll be warmly welcomed by a representative who will assist with your transfer to the hotel. After check-in, take some time to relax and recover from your journey. If time permits, step out for a leisurely stroll to get your first glimpse of this iconic city—perhaps catch a view of Big Ben or enjoy a cozy café nearby. Your unforgettable European adventure begins in one of the world’s most iconic capitals.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Embark on an enriching London city tour featuring entrance to two of its most iconic landmarks—Westminster Abbey and Tower Bridge. Discover the rich history of Westminster Abbey, the coronation site of British monarchs, and admire its stunning Gothic architecture. Continue to Tower Bridge, where panoramic views and the glass walkway await. Along the way, enjoy sights of Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and more, offering a perfect blend of culture, heritage, and city charm.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

After breakfast, check out from your Paris hotel and head to the station to board a high-speed TGV train to Nice, the jewel of the French Riviera. Enjoy a scenic journey through the picturesque countryside of southern France, with views of rolling hills, vineyards, and coastal landscapes. The comfortable ride takes approximately six hours, offering a relaxing transition from the bustling capital to the laid-back charm of the Riviera. Upon arrival in Nice, you’ll be transferred to your hotel. Take the rest of the day to unwind or explore the vibrant Promenade des Anglais and soak in the Mediterranean ambiance.

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Nice and head to the train station for a scenic journey to Milan, Italy’s fashion and cultural capital. The train ride offers stunning views of the Mediterranean coastline, charming villages, and dramatic alpine landscapes as you cross from France into Italy. The journey takes around five hours and provides a comfortable and picturesque travel experience. Upon arrival at Milan Centrale Station, you will be transferred to your hotel. Spend the rest of the day at leisure, taking in the elegant atmosphere, designer boutiques, and historic charm that make Milan truly unique.

Discover the elegance and history of Milan with Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Start at the breathtaking Duomo di Milano, a Gothic masterpiece, before strolling through the glamorous Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, Italy’s oldest shopping gallery. Visit the world-famous La Scala Opera House, and explore the impressive Sforza Castle, a symbol of Milan’s Renaissance glory. Walk through the stylish streets of the Brera district, soaking in its artistic charm. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, enjoy a perfectly curated experience that blends history, fashion, and modern elegance. Let us make your Milan adventure truly unforgettable!

packages.package_name: London Paris Fusion History Meets Romance
packages.overview:
• Land in the romantic capital of France and settle into your hotel.

  • Explore Parisian landmarks with an Eiffel Tower visit and a scenic Seine River cruise.

  • Spend a magical day at Disneyland Paris.

  • Travel to London and enjoy your first taste of British charm.

  • Discover London’s highlights and ride the iconic London Eye.

  • Enjoy the scenic beauty and academic prestige on a full-day guided tour.

  • Explore royal history, ancient wonders, and Roman heritage.

  • Experience lifelike celebrity encounters at the famous wax museum.

  • Say goodbye to London and depart with wonderful memories.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.overview:
• Athens – The Cradle of Civilization

  • Santorini – A Romantic Paradise

    • Explore the Acropolis of Athens, home to the Parthenon and a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

    • Visit the Temple of Olympian Zeus and Ancient Agora, once the heart of Athenian democracy.

    • Wander through the charming Plaka District, lined with neoclassical houses, tavernas, and boutiques.

  • Mykonos – The Island of Glamour

    • Witness the world-famous sunset from Oia Village, with its blue-domed churches and whitewashed houses.

    • Relax at Red Beach and Perissa Beach, famous for their volcanic sands and crystal-clear waters.

    • Visit the ancient ruins of Akrotiri, a Minoan city preserved under volcanic ash.

  • Crete – The Land of Legends

    • Stroll through Mykonos Town (Chora) with its narrow alleyways, windmills, and vibrant nightlife.

    • Unwind on the pristine shores of Paradise Beach, known for its lively beach clubs.

    • Take a boat trip to Delos Island, one of Greece’s most important mythological and archaeological sites.

  1. Meteora – Monasteries in the Sky

    • Explore the Palace of Knossos, the center of the Minoan civilization.

    • Hike the Samaria Gorge, one of Europe’s longest and most scenic gorges.

    • Visit Elafonissi Beach, known for its pink sand and shallow turquoise waters.

  • Delphi – The Oracle’s Legacy

    • Discover the awe-inspiring Meteora Monasteries, perched on towering rock formations.

    • Experience the serenity of this UNESCO-listed site, a spiritual retreat for centuries.

  • Zakynthos – The Ionian Gem

    • Marvel at the stunning Navagio Beach (Shipwreck Beach), accessible only by boat.

    • Swim in the Blue Caves, famous for their vibrant blue reflections.

    • Visit the ancient sanctuary of Apollo at Delphi, once the most revered oracle of the ancient world.

    • Walk the Sacred Way and admire the ruins of the Temple of Apollo and Tholos of Delphi.

Welcome to your incredible journey with Travelxploria! Upon arrival, our friendly representative will greet you at the airport and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. Take this time to relax and soak in the first impressions of your destination. Whether you choose to unwind in your room, explore nearby attractions, or enjoy a leisurely stroll, the day is yours. Later in the afternoon, our representative will provide all the essential details about the upcoming adventure—either in person or through the information boards at the hotel reception.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Athens International Airport","to":"Athens","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":797,"h_name":"Novotel Athenes","h_country":"Greece","h_city":"Athens","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Athens/Novotel Athenes/1741591952144-2023-10-28.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Athens/Novotel Athenes/1741591952290-unnamed - 2025-03-10T130155.862.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Athens/Novotel Athenes/1741591952296-unnamed - 2025-03-10T130152.329.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"City Tour of Athens","day_summary":"

We´ll embark on a city tour of Athens with a local guide, visiting landmarks such as the Presidential Mansion, the Panathenaic Stadium where the first modern Olympic Games were held, the National Library, and the bustling squares of the city center. We´ll also explore the newer neighborhoods that developed after the 2004 Olympic Games. The tour will conclude at the Acropolis (admission not included). In the evening, we´ll provide a transfer to the historical neighborhood of Plaka, renowned for its charming Greek tavernas and opportunities to immerse yourself in the rich folklore of this country.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Kalabaka","country":"Greece","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Athens to Kalabaka","day_summary":"

We’ll depart early in the morning towards northern Greece, stopping at Kamena Vourla, a charming seaside tourist hub surrounded by stunning landscapes. We´ll then proceed north, stopping at the Thermopylae Mountain Pass, the historic site of the famous battle. Next, we´ll visit Kastraki, a picturesque village with beautiful views of the entire valley, where you´ll have free time for lunch. Afterward, we´ll explore the Meteora, a breathtaking UNESCO World Heritage Site. Admission to one of its renowned monasteries is included. Dinner will be provided in Kalabaka.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Athens","to":"Kalabaka","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":778,"h_name":"Divani Meteora Hotel","h_country":"Greece","h_city":"Kalabaka","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kalabaka/Divani Meteora Hotel/1744887790593-Divani Meteora Hotel 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kalabaka/Divani Meteora Hotel/1744887790726-Divani Meteora Hotel.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Kalabaka/Divani Meteora Hotel/1744887790765-Divani Meteora Hotel 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Athens","country":"Greece","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Greece/Athens/1740987761004-istockphoto-1270775001-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Greece/Athens/1740987761066-istockphoto-157180942-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Greece/Athens/1740987761102-istockphoto-1028749698-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Kalabaka to Athens","day_summary":"

We’ll journey south through the Thessaly region, where you’ll experience stunning landscapes, before reaching Delphi. Here, we´ll explore the exquisite archaeological site overlooking the Gulf of Corinth, with breathtaking views. There will be time for lunch. Following that, we´ll head to the Hosios Loukas Monastery, renowned as one of the most beautiful Byzantine monasteries in Greece and a World Heritage Site. Its magnificent 11th-century mosaics are truly remarkable. We´ll then continue our journey towards Athens, arriving in the evening.

You´ll have free time in the morning to enjoy the city, visit museums, or shop. In the afternoon, we´ll transfer to the Piraeus Port to board a night ferry, featuring cruise-like amenities. You´ll stay in a double cabin and spend the night on board.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Crete (Heraklion)","country":"Greece","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Greece/Crete (Heraklion)/1740987660038-istockphoto-1389134802-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Greece/Crete (Heraklion)/1740987660117-istockphoto-1215376391-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Greece/Crete (Heraklion)/1740987660157-istockphoto-1161120260-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Heraklion Crete Tour","day_summary":"

Arrival at 7:00 a.m. in Heraklion on the island of Crete. We’ll travel along the coast towards the west of the island. Our first stop is Rethymno, a beautiful coastal city of Venetian origin, dominated by its medieval castle. Next, we’ll visit Chania, a captivating city with an impressive fortress and stately mansions. Chania has been contested by Romans, Byzantines, Venetians, Genoese, Turks, Egyptians, and Greeks throughout its history. We´ll return to Heraklion at the end of the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Ferry","from":"Athens","to":"Crete (Heraklion)","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":851,"h_name":"Viking Star","h_country":"Greece","h_city":"Crete (Heraklion)","h_type":"Cruise","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Crete (Heraklion)/Viking Star/1744888164230-Viking.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Crete (Heraklion)/Viking Star/1744888164386-Viking 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Heraklion","country":"Greece","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Historic & Cultural Excursion of Heraklion","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll embark on an excursion to the Palace of Knossos, where we´ll delve into the Minoan culture that laid the foundation for Greek civilization four thousand years ago (admission and guided tour included). After our visit, we’ll travel through the island´s tall mountains and journey southward to the shores of the Libyan Sea, arriving at Agia Galini—a picturesque town with winding streets, a charming fishing port, and crowded taverns. You’ll have time for lunch and, if you wish, a swim in the sea. We´ll return to the capital of Crete at day’s end.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Crete (Heraklion)","to":"Heraklion","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":801,"h_name":"ibis Styles Heraklion Central","h_country":"Greece","h_city":"Heraklion","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Heraklion/ibis Styles Heraklion Central/1741592385850-unnamed - 2025-03-10T130931.797.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Heraklion/ibis Styles Heraklion Central/1741592385919-unnamed - 2025-03-10T130921.145.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Heraklion/ibis Styles Heraklion Central/1741592385951-unnamed - 2025-03-10T130914.253.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Coastal Tour of Heraklion","day_summary":"

We’ll travel along the coast towards the east of the island. Our first stop will be in the small town of Kritsa to visit Panagia Kera, a 13th-century church renowned for its exquisite frescoes (admission included). Afterward, we’ll arrive at Agios Nikolaos, a picturesque town with a natural port. You’ll have time to stroll and enjoy lunch. Next, we’ll continue to Elounda, a former city-state turned into a beautiful tourist enclave. Here, we’ll embark on a boat ride to Spinalonga Island to visit the Fortress of Spinalonga, an ancient Venetian fortress later used as a leper colony for many years. After the visit, we’ll return by boat and head back to Heraklion for accommodation.

Early in the morning, we’ll transfer to the port and board a high-speed ferry to Santorini, arriving between 09:00 and 10:00 a.m. From there, we’ll journey by bus through stunning landscapes to Oia, undoubtedly the most spectacular town on the island: vibrant white streets, beautiful cliff views, remnants of a castle, and windmills. You’ll have time for lunch and a leisurely stroll. Later, we’ll visit Fira, the island’s capital. Those interested can descend to the port by cable car or donkey and admire the cruise ships. Afterwards, we’ll proceed to the port to board a high-speed ferry departing around 03:15 p.m. Arrival in Athens expected around midnight.

packages.overview:
1: Arrival in Gangtok – Meet & greet at NJP/Bagdogra, transfer to Gangtok, MG Marg stroll, optional candlelight dinner.

2: Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir – Visit Tsomgo Lake, Baba Mandir, optional Nathula Pass, return to Gangtok.

3: Gangtok to Pelling via Ravangla – Visit Buddha Park, Temi Tea Garden, check-in to Pelling resort, bonfire evening.

4: Pelling Sightseeing – Explore Pemayangtse Monastery, Rabdentse Ruins, Kanchenjunga Waterfalls, Skywalk, and Singshore Bridge.

5: Pelling to Darjeeling – Drive via Mirik Lake, check-in to a heritage hotel, evening stroll on Mall Road.

6: Darjeeling Sightseeing – Tiger Hill sunrise, Batasia Loop, HMI, Ghoom Monastery, and tea-tasting at Happy Valley.

7: Departure – After breakfast, transfer to NJP/Bagdogra with cherished memories.

4o

[{"city":"Gangtok","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Gangtok/1744985172804-AdobeStock_405469464.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Gangtok/1744985175170-AdobeStock_515782402.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Gangtok/1744985175295-AdobeStock_539996343.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Gangtok – The Romantic Escape Begins","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Bagdogra Airport (IXB) / NJP Railway Station, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will warmly welcome you and assist with a smooth transfer to Gangtok (5,480 ft). Enjoy a scenic 3-4 hour drive as our guide shares fascinating insights about the lush valleys, waterfalls, and the beautiful Teesta River. Upon reaching, check in to your luxury honeymoon suite, where a welcome drink and beautifully decorated room await. In the evening, take a guided stroll on MG Marg, with our expert recommending the best cafés for a romantic coffee date. Optional: Our guide can also arrange a special candlelight dinner for an intimate evening. Conclude the day with a cozy overnight stay at a premium hotel in Gangtok.

Mandir","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, set off on a romantic drive to Tsomgo Lake (12,310 ft) with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will share fascinating stories about the region’s history and culture. Marvel at the breathtaking crystal-clear glacial lake, surrounded by snow-clad mountains, while our guide captures the best moments for you. Optional: Enjoy a romantic yak ride or sip on hot tea as you soak in the stunning views. Visit the sacred Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, where our guide will narrate the heroic tale of the revered Indian Army soldier. If permits are available, embark on an exciting journey to Nathula Pass (Indo-China border) for an unforgettable experience. Return to Gangtok and unwind in your cozy hotel, where special honeymoon arrangements await, ensuring a memorable evening. Overnight stay in Gangtok.

Post breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Pelling (6,800 ft), a romantic haven in West Sikkim, accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide who will enrich your journey with local insights. En route, visit the tranquil Ravangla Buddha Park, a serene setting perfect for couples to capture beautiful moments. Stop by Temi Tea Garden, Sikkim’s only tea estate, where our guide will introduce you to the art of tea-tasting while you enjoy the refreshing flavors. Upon arrival in Pelling, check in to a luxurious resort offering breathtaking mountain views. Spend the evening at leisure, creating unforgettable memories around a private bonfire with your partner. Overnight stay in Pelling with special honeymoon décor, ensuring a magical experience.

After breakfast, set out for an enriching exploration of Pelling’s top attractions with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will provide fascinating insights into each destination. Begin with a visit to Pemayangtse Monastery, one of the oldest and most beautiful monasteries, where you can soak in its peaceful ambiance. Take a romantic stroll through Rabdentse Ruins, reliving history amidst scenic surroundings. Witness nature’s magic at Rimbi & Kanchenjunga Waterfalls, capturing breathtaking moments with your beloved. Experience the thrill of heights at Pelling Sky Walk and the spectacular Singshore Bridge, offering panoramic views of the lush valleys. For an added touch of relaxation, a romantic couple’s spa session can be arranged at the hotel. Overnight stay in Pelling, ensuring a perfect blend of adventure and romance.

After breakfast, check out and embark on a romantic drive to Darjeeling (7,000 ft.) with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will ensure a smooth and scenic journey. En route, stop at Sumendu Lake (Mirik) for a peaceful boat ride, where you can soak in the tranquil beauty of the surroundings. Upon arrival in Darjeeling, check in to a romantic heritage hotel, offering an old-world charm perfect for honeymooners. In the evening, take a leisurely stroll through Mall Road, hand-in-hand, and visit Chowrasta, an ideal spot for a quiet, intimate moment. To complete the day, enjoy a cup of authentic Darjeeling tea at a hill-view café, savoring the aroma and serenity of the hills. Overnight stay in Darjeeling, ensuring a day filled with love and unforgettable memories.

/1742886685917-MAYFAIR Hill Resort Darjeeling 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Darjeeling Sightseeing – Sunrise & Romance","day_summary":"

Wake up early for a mesmerizing sunrise at Tiger Hill, where our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will accompany you to witness the breathtaking view of the Kanchenjunga range, a truly magical experience for honeymooners. After returning to the hotel for a delightful breakfast, set out for a day of exploration with your guide, visiting the scenic Batasia Loop & War Memorial, offering stunning toy train views, followed by the Padmaja Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park, home to rare species like Red Pandas. Continue to the Himalayan Mountaineering Institute, where you can learn about the region’s rich mountaineering history, before heading to Tenzing Rock & Ghoom Monastery, perfect for peaceful moments and stunning photographs. As the day winds down, spend a romantic evening at Happy Valley Tea Estate, indulging in a tea-tasting session amidst lush plantations. End the day with a farewell candlelight dinner at your hotel, making your last night in Darjeeling truly unforgettable. Overnight stay in Darjeeling.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure – A Farewell to the Hills","day_summary":"

After a lavish breakfast, pack your bags and cherish the beautiful memories of your honeymoon as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and representative assist you with a smooth transfer to Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station. Enjoy the scenic farewell drive, reminiscing about the magical moments spent amidst the serene landscapes of Sikkim and Darjeeling. As you bid adieu to this enchanting paradise, take with you the unforgettable experiences and a promise to return for more romantic adventures in the future.

packages.overview:
1. Uttarakhand: A picturesque Himalayan state offering a perfect mix of scenic beauty, peace, and charm.

  2. Nainital: Famous for its shimmering Naini Lake, colonial charm, ropeway rides, and bustling Mall Road, it’s a favorite for families and honeymooners alike.

  3. Ranikhet: A quiet hill town surrounded by pine forests and colonial-era buildings, known for peaceful landscapes, temples, and views of snow-clad peaks.

  4. Kausani: A scenic gem offering breathtaking sunrise views over the Himalayas, peaceful tea estates, and serene vibes perfect for unwinding.

Begin your day with a lip-smacking breakfast before setting out to explore the scenic hills of Nainital. Spend quality time with your partner, soaking in the natural beauty and tranquility of this charming hill station. Visit the serene lakes of Bhimtal, Sattal, and Naukuchiatal, where you can indulge in boating and photography. Later, take a leisurely stroll along Mall Road, visit the Boating Club, and enjoy panoramic views from Snow Point. As the day comes to an end, return to your cozy retreat, cherishing the romantic moments spent together. Overnight stay in Nainital.

Stroll through the serene environment, capturing the beauty of rolling green hills and misty horizons. Visit the Annashakti Ashram, a peaceful retreat where Mahatma Gandhi once stayed, and experience the tranquil ambiance that reflects his simple yet profound lifestyle. After a soulful exploration, return to your hotel and enjoy a delicious lunch, savoring the flavors of the region. Spend the rest of the day at leisure, embracing the calm and scenic beauty of Kausani.

Relax and enjoy the scenic drive, reminiscing about the breathtaking landscapes and unforgettable experiences. Upon arrival, you will be dropped off at the Delhi railway station or airport, where you can proceed with your onward journey. As you bid farewell to this enchanting trip, take with you the cherished moments of nature, romance, and tranquility, making it a perfectly curated travel experience.

packages.overview:
• ​Goa: India’s beach paradise, known for its golden beaches, nightlife, Portuguese heritage, and adventure activities.
  • ​North Goa Sightseeing: Explore Aguada Fort, Baga Beach, Anjuna Beach, Vagator Beach, and the vibrant nightlife.​
  • South Goa Sightseeing: Visit serene beaches like Colva and Palolem, Basilica of Bom Jesus, Se Cathedral, and spice plantations.
  • ​Dudhsagar Falls: Witness the breathtaking milky cascades surrounded by lush greenery and enjoy a jeep safari.​

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you on an exciting North Goa tour. Explore the iconic Fort Aguada Lighthouse, followed by visits to the stunning beaches of Candolim, Calangute, Baga, Anjuna, and Vagator. Discover the historic Chapora Fort, offering breathtaking views of the coastline. After a day filled with exploration and scenic beauty, return to the hotel for an overnight stay, with the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day South Goa Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on an enriching South Goa tour. Begin with a visit to the Old Goa Church, followed by the revered Mangueshi and Mahalaxmi Temples. Continue to Margao for a sightseeing tour before heading to the picturesque Miramar Beach and the scenic Dona Paula viewpoint. Conclude the day with a visit to the Panjim Church, soaking in the cultural and architectural beauty of the region. After a memorable day, return to the hotel for an overnight stay, with the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Dudhsagar Falls","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on an exciting journey to Dudhsagar Falls with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. Nestled within the Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park in the Western Ghats, these majestic falls mark a breathtaking point along the Mandovi River as it flows toward Panjim and meets the Arabian Sea. Surrounded by lush deciduous forests teeming with rich biodiversity, the falls offer a mesmerizing spectacle, especially during the monsoon season, when torrential rains transform them into a massive cascading sheet of water. Even during the dry season, the natural beauty of the area remains captivating. With the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience, enjoy this unforgettable encounter with nature before returning to your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria and our best on-ground support staff will assist you with a smooth transfer to Goa Airport for your departure. As your memorable journey comes to an end, we at Travelxploria hope that we have made your stay truly worthwhile, ensuring that you leave with a bundle of happy memories to cherish forever. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again on another incredible adventure.

packages.overview:
​Dal Lake – Glide on a peaceful shikara ride, surrounded by snow-capped peaks and traditional houseboats in Srinagar’s serene waters.
Awantipura Ruins – Discover the ancient stone carvings of this 9th-century temple, whispering tales of Kashmir’s rich heritage.
Betaab Valley – Wander through lush meadows and crystal-clear streams, where Bollywood’s romance meets breathtaking landscapes.
Gulmarg Gondola – Soar above snow-laden slopes on one of the world’s highest cable cars, unveiling majestic mountain views.
Mughal Gardens – Stroll through terraced gardens, where cascading fountains and vibrant flowers frame Dal Lake’s stunning beauty.
Tulip Garden – If in season, witness a riot of colors, as thousands of tulips bloom against the backdrop of Kashmir’s hills.
Thajiwas Glacier – Embark on an adventurous pony ride to this snowy paradise, embraced by towering Himalayan peaks.
Lal Chowk Market – Immerse yourself in Kashmir’s bustling culture, shopping for handwoven shawls, saffron, and exquisite handicrafts.
Shankaracharya Temple – Climb to this sacred hilltop shrine, where panoramic city views and a spiritual aura await.

Next, visit the Mughal Mosque, showcasing exquisite architecture and peaceful surroundings. Take in the cultural richness of the city, with its mix of gardens, history, and local charm. In the evening, check into Srinagar hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Visit to Sonmarg","day_summary":"

After breakfast, depart for Sonmarg, known as \"The Meadow of Gold,\" located 84 km from Srinagar at an altitude of 9,000 feet. Surrounded by majestic mountains and vibrant flowers, Sonmarg is a paradise for nature lovers. You can hire ponies to visit the Thajiwas Glacier, a popular attraction during the summer months. After a day of scenic exploration, return to Srinagar for a relaxing evening and an overnight stay at Srinagar hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Depature Day ","day_summary":"

On the final day of your journey, wake up to the tranquil beauty of Dal Lake and enjoy a leisurely breakfast, savoring the last flavors of Kashmir. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with a seamless departure. If time allows, take a quiet stroll by the lake or explore a local market for some last-minute souvenirs perhaps a handwoven Kashmiri shawl or aromatic saffron. As you bid farewell to the snow-capped peaks, lush valleys, and peaceful houseboats, cherish the unforgettable memories. With a heart full of warmth and nostalgia, depart Srinagar.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Kashmir odyssey unfolds in a tapestry of emerald lakes, snow-draped vistas, and verdant valleys. Begin by gliding across Dal Lake’s mirror-like waters in a traditional shikara, framed by the lofty Pir Panjal Range and dotted with floating gardens. Next, ascend to new heights on the Gulmarg Gondola—Asia’s highest cable car—where panoramic views of snow-clad peaks give way to exhilarating snow activities at every turn. Journey onward to the Pahalgam Valleys, wandering through the lush meadows of Aru, the cinematic landscapes of Betaab, and the fairy-tale groves of Baisaran. Then, step into a living poem at the Mughal Gardens, where terraced lawns, tinkling fountains, and vibrant flowerbeds whisper stories of royal retreat. Venture off the beaten path to the hidden haven of Doodhpathri Meadows, a serene expanse of rolling green carpeted with pine and birch. Finally, let Travelxploria guide you to Sonmarg’s Thajiwas Glacier, where sparkling ice fields beckon for scenic treks beneath the grandeur of the Himalayas—leaving you with heart-stirring memories of Kashmir’s timeless splendor.

Breathe in the crisp mountain air as you drive to your hotel, where the beauty of the valley embraces you. After a moment to settle in, embark on a tranquil Shikara ride on the breathtaking Dal Lake, drifting past floating gardens and wooden houseboats, with the majestic Himalayas painting the perfect backdrop. As dusk settles, retreat to your traditional houseboat for an overnight stay.

Spend a full day exploring the breathtaking valleys of Pahalgam. Start with the enchanting Aru Valley, where lush meadows meet towering peaks, followed by a visit to the iconic Betaab Valley, famous for its pristine beauty. Next, venture to Chandanwari, the starting point for the Amarnath Yatra, or discover the untouched splendor of Baisaran Valley. As the day winds down, relax in the Pahalgam, for an overnight stay.

Depart from the peaceful Pahalgam and head back to Srinagar, where your day is filled with exploration. Start with a visit to the revered Hazratbal Shrine and the panoramic Shankaracharya Temple. In the afternoon, unwind amidst the beauty of Mughal Gardens, starting with the majestic Nishat, Shalimar, and Chasmashahi Gardens, each offering lush greenery and captivating views. As the day draws to a close, return to Srinagar for a comfortable overnight stay.

Embark on a scenic adventure to the serene Doodhpatri, a tranquil meadow tucked away in the heart of Kashmir’s mountains. Surrounded by snow-capped peaks and lush pine forests, the area exudes peace and beauty, perfect for a day of exploration. Stroll through the pristine landscapes, breathe in the fresh mountain air, and enjoy the peaceful solitude. After a day of bliss, return to Srinagar for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Visit to Sonmarg","day_summary":"

Set out for a full-day exploration of Sonmarg, where towering peaks and lush meadows create a mesmerizing backdrop. Visit the magnificent Thajiwas Glacier, embark on a short trek, or simply immerse yourself in the tranquil landscapes of this alpine paradise. After soaking in the breath-taking beauty of Sonmarg, return to Srinagar, where the calm ambiance of the city awaits. Unwind and rest during your overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey through Srinagar comes to a close, our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with a seamless departure. Take in the last glimpses of the enchanting landscapes, the serene Dal Lake, and the majestic snow-capped peaks that have made this trip so special. The rich culture, warm hospitality, and breathtaking beauty of Kashmir will forever hold a place in your heart. With cherished memories and a soul refreshed by nature’s wonders, you’ll be transferred to the airport.

packages.overview: Shimla, the Queen of Hills, offers a dreamy escape for honeymooners with its charming colonial architecture, snow-capped mountains, and romantic ambiance. This picturesque hill station is perfect for couples seeking serenity and scenic beauty. Stroll hand-in-hand along the Mall Road, enjoy panoramic views from Scandal Point, and visit the iconic Christ Church. Take a ride on the historic Kalka-Shimla toy train for a nostalgic journey through misty hills and pine forests. Cozy up in hillside resorts, relish candlelight dinners, and explore nearby spots like Kufri and Chail. Shimla promises a magical start to your new journey together.

Wake up to a bright morning in Shimla, after having your breakfast get ready for the sightseeing tour. Enjoy your visit to the famous Kufri Ski Resort in Shimla. Further, you get to visit Vice Regal Lodge which is also called the Indian Institute of Advanced Study. The place is called ViceRegal Lodge the Viceroys of India used to stay here. Later, also enjoy your visit to the Himachal State Museum, which displays ancient artifacts in a Victorian mansion. The tour also gives you an opportunity to visit the Jakhu Temple / Jakhu Hill. After a tiresome day return back to your hotel room and enjoy a sound sleep during your overnight stay at the hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Half day tour and leisure","day_summary":"

After enjoying your hearty breakfast set out to visit the famous Ridge and The Mall; also visit the second oldest church of North India, the Christ Church temples after that Kali Bari Temple and Tara Devi Temple. It will bring you peace. You can also enjoy your visit to Annandale, an army area which will definitely make you feel proud of being an Indian . Rest of the day is free for leisure and exploring on foot. 

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Departure ","day_summary":"

Your Holiday ends today check out from the hotel and descend down towards chandigarh to go back home.
