Experience an unforgettable day at Resorts World Sentosa, with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and best on-ground support ensuring a hassle-free adventure. Begin at the S.E.A. Aquarium, one of the world’s largest, where you’ll be mesmerized by 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. If visiting during the holidays, dive into the fun with the Splashtacular Christmas, featuring thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river. As the sun sets, prepare for the Wings of Time—a breathtaking spectacle of lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping, telling the tale of a mythical bird’s epic journey through time.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Minion’s Perspective Experience: Sentosa’s Best from Above & Beyond","day_summary":"

Begin your adventure with a breathtaking ride on the Singapore Cable Car, offering panoramic 360-degree views of Mount Faber’s lush greenery and the scenic Sentosa coastline. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support and seamless transfers, you’ll effortlessly reach top attractions like MegaZip, Universal Studios Singapore, and Siloso Beach. Sentosa Island is a paradise of contrasts—relax on pristine beaches, dive into underwater wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium, or feel the thrill at Universal Studios. As night falls, witness the stunning Wings of Time show, an enchanting spectacle of lights and water, making Sentosa a truly unforgettable destination.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Magical Journey: Avatar Experience at Gardens by the Bay","day_summary":"

Step into a world of wonder at Gardens by the Bay, where nature and fantasy merge into an extraordinary experience. With Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and best on-ground support, enjoy a stress-free visit to this iconic attraction. As night falls, watch the gardens transform into Pandora, the breathtaking world from Avatar. Wander through bioluminescent landscapes, encounter lifelike animatronic banshees, and immerse yourself in the mystical beauty of this cinematic spectacle. Against the backdrop of the Supertree Grove and Cloud Forest, this one-of-a-kind adventure promises to be a highlight of your Singapore journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mandai Wildlife Adventure","day_summary":"

Start your day with an extraordinary wildlife experience as Travelxploria’s expert team ensures a seamless pick-up and drop-off for a hassle-free journey to Mandai. Enjoy Breakfast in the Wild at Singapore Zoo, where you can savor delicious local and international delights while watching orangutans gracefully swing through the treetops. After breakfast, explore the open-concept zoo, home to a diverse range of animals in lush, natural habitats. Continue your adventure at Mandai River Wonders, Asia’s only river-themed wildlife park, where you’ll encounter giant pandas at the Yangtze River zone, majestic Indian gharials of the Ganges, and playful squirrel monkeys in Wild Amazonia. A perfect blend of nature, wildlife, and unforgettable moments.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, bid farewell to Singapore as Travelxploria’s dedicated representative ensures a smooth check-out and hassle-free airport transfer. Enjoy a relaxed ride to Changi Airport, reflecting on the incredible experiences, breathtaking sights, and unforgettable adventures from your journey. Whether it was the thrilling attractions, vibrant cityscapes, or serene natural wonders, your Singapore trip has been nothing short of extraordinary. As you board your flight home, take with you beautiful memories and a heart full of wanderlust.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Southeast Asian adventure with Travelxploria, beginning in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll marvel at Putrajaya’s modern splendor and the towering Petronas Twin Towers. Ascend to the cool heights of Genting Highlands for entertainment, shopping, and a thrilling cable car ride before diving into a full day of water slides and amusement-packed fun at Sunway Lagoon. Continue your city discoveries with a guided Kuala Lumpur tour, then journey to vibrant Singapore to wander Marina Bay’s waterfront, plunge into blockbuster thrills at Universal Studios, and unwind on Sentosa Island—complete with beaches, iconic attractions, and the mesmerizing Wings of Time show. Cap off your journey with a curated Singapore city tour, board a luxury cruise for days of scenic ocean relaxation and onboard delights, and finally disembark for your seamless transfer to Changi Airport—courtesy of Travelxploria’s meticulous planning and seamless service.

With our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, enjoy a seamless transfer to your hotel, where you can unwind after your journey. Once refreshed, embark on an exciting tour of Putrajaya, Malaysia’s stunning administrative capital, known for its grand architecture and serene landscapes. Later, head to the world-famous Petronas Twin Towers for a breathtaking photo stop, capturing the towering beauty of this architectural marvel. Whether it’s the city’s modern skyline or its cultural charm, our expert team ensures a smooth, hassle-free experience from arrival to exploration. As the evening unfolds, immerse yourself in Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant ambiance before returning to your hotel, setting the perfect tone for the adventures ahead.

Start your day with a seamless pick-up as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide welcome you for a breathtaking journey to Genting Highlands. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive as we leave behind the bustling streets of Kuala Lumpur, ascending into the cool, misty heights of Malaysia’s premier hill resort. With the best on-ground support staff ensuring a smooth experience, arrive at the base station for an unforgettable Awana Skyway cable car ride, offering panoramic views of the lush rainforest below.

Once at the top, immerse yourself in a world of entertainment—try your luck at the famous casino, explore the indoor theme parks, or indulge in a shopping spree at Genting Premium Outlets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, our team ensures a hassle-free experience, making this highland retreat a perfect blend of thrill and tranquility.

Gear up for an action-packed day as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide ensure a seamless pick-up, taking you to Malaysia’s ultimate theme park—Sunway Lagoon. With the best on-ground support staff handling every detail, you can focus on the fun from the moment you arrive.

Dive into adventure at the Water Park, where exhilarating slides and wave pools promise endless thrills. Experience heart-pounding rides at the Amusement Park, encounter exotic animals at the Wildlife Park, and conquer the spooky zones at Scream Park. For adrenaline junkies, the Extreme Park offers bungee jumping and ATV rides.

Whether you're riding the Vuvuzela, Asia’s largest water ride, or simply floating along the lazy river, Sunway Lagoon guarantees fun for all ages. As the sun sets, our team ensures a smooth drop-off, leaving you with memories of a truly spectacular day.

Start your day with another round of excitement at Sunway Lagoon, where our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide ensure you make the most of this adventure-filled destination. With the best on-ground support staff, you can seamlessly navigate through the park’s thrilling zones—from heart-racing rides at the Extreme Park to close encounters with wildlife at the Wildlife Park.

After an adrenaline-fueled morning, transition into the cultural heartbeat of Kuala Lumpur with a short city tour. Witness the grandeur of Merdeka Square, the beauty of the National Mosque, and the energy of Chinatown. Capture stunning city views with a photo stop at the Petronas Twin Towers, an iconic landmark of Malaysia.

As the day winds down, our team ensures a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of adventure and culture, seamlessly woven together.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

packages.overview:
• Thrilling Night Safari with Unique Nocturnal Wildlife Encounters Experience the world’s first nocturnal zoo with Travelxploria, where you’ll journey through lush jungles and come face-to-face with rare night creatures under the stars.
  • Iconic City Landmarks on a Comprehensive Sightseeing Tour
    Travelxploria takes you on an expertly curated tour of Singapore’s most famous landmarks, blending rich history with awe-inspiring modern marvels.
  • Breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark Views
    Rise high above the city with Travelxploria and soak in stunning panoramic views from the iconic Marina Bay Sands SkyPark observation deck.
    Futuristic Gardens by the Bay with Supertree Grove & Cloud Forest
  • Wander through a dreamscape of towering Supertrees and mist-covered waterfalls at Gardens by the Bay, exclusively arranged by Travelxploria for a magical experience.
    Ultimate Movie Magic at Universal Studios
    Unleash your inner adventurer with Travelxploria at Universal Studios, where thrilling rides and cinematic worlds bring your favorite movies to life.
  • Exciting Rides & Live Entertainment
    From adrenaline-pumping roller coasters to dazzling live shows, Travelxploria ensures you skip the lines and dive straight into the action-packed fun.
  • Action-Packed Sentosa Island Adventure
    Travelxploria crafts the perfect Sentosa Island day, packed with beach fun, thrilling attractions, and endless adventures for the whole family.
  • Mesmerizing Wings of Time Light & Water Show
    End your evening with Travelxploria's special seating for the spectacular Wings of Time show—a breathtaking blend of lasers, fountains, and pyrotechnics.
    Memorable Shopping & Cultural Experiences
    Discover the best of Singapore’s shopping and vibrant culture with Travelxploria’s handpicked tours of Orchard Road, local markets, and heritage streets.
  • Luxurious & Comfortable Transfers
    Travelxploria provides seamless, air-conditioned luxury transfers throughout your trip, ensuring every journey is as comfortable as the destination.
  • Tropical Island Relaxation at Siloso Beach
    Sink your toes into golden sands and unwind at Siloso Beach, where Travelxploria offers the perfect mix of tropical relaxation and island vibes.
  • Adrenaline-Pumping Adventure Cove Waterpark
    Splash into excitement at Adventure Cove with Travelxploria, where high-speed rides, lazy rivers, and snorkeling adventures await.
  • Vibrant Chinatown & Little India Exploration
    Explore the colorful streets of Chinatown and Little India with Travelxploria, diving deep into rich traditions, bustling markets, and delicious flavors.
  • Delightful Local & International Cuisine
    Taste Singapore’s culinary wonders curated by Travelxploria, from vibrant hawker fare to elegant international dining experiences.
  • Unforgettable Photo Moments at Merlion Park
    Capture picture-perfect memories at the iconic Merlion Park, with Travelxploria guiding you to the best spots and moments.
  • Fascinating Marine Life at S.E.A. Aquarium
    Dive into the magical underwater world of S.E.A. Aquarium with Travelxploria, where thousands of marine species mesmerize and inspire.

Start your day with an exciting city sightseeing tour, effortlessly arranged by Travelxploria’s expert team, ensuring seamless pick-up and drop-off with the best on-ground support. Explore iconic landmarks, from the historic Raffles Hotel to the vibrant Civic District, immersing yourself in Singapore’s rich heritage. Next, ascend to the Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline and Marina Bay unfold before you. In the afternoon, step into the magical Gardens by the Bay, where the futuristic Supertree Grove, misty Cloud Forest, and colorful Flower Dome create an enchanting escape into nature’s wonders.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Ultimate Universal Studios Adventure","day_summary":"

Get ready for an action-packed day at Universal Studios Singapore, with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and best on-ground support ensuring a stress-free experience. Step into a world of movie magic, where thrilling rides, immersive attractions, and live entertainment bring your favorite films to life. Brace yourself for adrenaline-pumping roller coasters like Battlestar Galactica, embark on the Transformers 3D Ride, or journey through the Jurassic Park Rapids Adventure. From exciting stunt shows to meeting beloved characters, this theme park promises fun for all ages. A must-visit for movie lovers and thrill-seekers alike!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sentosa Island Adventure & Mesmerizing Wings of Time Show","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable day trip to Sentosa Island with Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, ensuring seamless transfers and a hassle-free experience. Discover a world of excitement, from exploring the wonders of the ocean at S.E.A. Aquarium to the thrilling slides of Adventure Cove Waterpark. Unwind on pristine beaches, soak in the island’s vibrant atmosphere, and enjoy its top attractions. As night falls, witness the Wings of Time show, a breathtaking spectacle of water, light, lasers, and fire effects, set against the sea—an enchanting finale to your perfect Sentosa getaway.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Singapore","day_summary":"

As your incredible Singapore adventure comes to an end, Travelxploria ensures a seamless departure with hassle-free transfers and the best on-ground support. Spend your final hours indulging in some last-minute shopping, picking up souvenirs at vibrant markets or luxury malls. Savor a relaxing coffee at a chic café or take a leisurely stroll through the city one last time. With a heart full of unforgettable memories, head to the airport for your onward journey, cherishing the experiences that made your Singapore trip truly extraordinary. Until next time, Singapore!

packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian escape with Travelxploria, beginning in Singapore where you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for a leisurely welcome. Dive into island thrills on Sentosa—with round-trip cable car rides and Siloso Beach lounging—before immersing yourself in the region’s botanical wonders at the National Orchid Garden and Gardens by the Bay. Next, fly to idyllic Langkawi for an exclusive Rainforest & Waterfall Explorer tour, followed by a Wildlife Paradise & Island Discovery adventure showcasing mangrove ecosystems and hidden coves. Finally, savor your last moments of tropical relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your smooth departure home.

Our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless pick-up from your hotel, making your journey effortless. As you glide above the cityscape, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will share fascinating insights about Singapore’s skyline and Sentosa’s vibrant history.

Upon arrival, step into the tropical paradise of Siloso Beach, where sun-kissed sands and gentle waves invite you to unwind. Whether you choose to relax, take a refreshing dip, or stroll along the scenic shore, the experience is pure bliss. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be at your service throughout, ensuring a hassle-free experience. After a rejuvenating day by the beach, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Sentosa’s charm.

Stroll through vibrant, meticulously curated gardens at your own pace. After a refreshing experience, our best on-ground support staff will ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Wildlife Paradise – Island Discovery","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exciting wildlife adventure with Travelxploria as we take you to the Langkawi Wildlife Park, a paradise for animal lovers! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a hassle-free journey. Led by our expert guide, explore this award-winning park, home to over 150 species of birds and animals from around the world. Feed friendly deer, marvel at vibrant macaws, and interact with adorable rabbits and exotic reptiles. Witness the fascinating walk-in aviary, where tropical birds fly freely around you. Enjoy engaging animal shows and learn about wildlife conservation in this immersive experience. Whether you're visiting with family or exploring solo, this trip promises unforgettable moments with nature. After a fun-filled and interactive visit, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable wildlife experience in Langkawi!

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria, beginning in dazzling Singapore where you’ll stroll through Marina Bay’s waterfront and wander the futuristic Gardens by the Bay. Feel the adrenaline rush at Universal Studios before returning to marvel at the Supertree Grove’s nightly light show. After a scenic city tour, board your luxury cruise for a day of laid-back onboard entertainment, then wake up to the sights of Kuala Lumpur—Tour the city’s landmarks, breathe in the cool mountain air at Genting Highlands, and explore the sacred Batu Caves and bustling local markets. Finally, Travelxploria wraps up your adventure with a seamless transfer and heartfelt farewell, leaving you with cherished memories of two vibrant countries.

Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. packages.overview: Bali, the Island of the Gods, is a paradise of lush rice terraces, sacred temples, and vibrant culture. From the artistic charm of Ubud to the sun-kissed beaches of Kuta and Uluwatu, every corner of Bali offers something magical. Just a boat ride away, the Gili Islands provide a serene escape with crystal-clear waters, white sandy beaches, and colorful coral reefs. Whether snorkeling, cycling around the islands, or simply unwinding by the sea, Gili offers a tranquil contrast to Bali’s lively energy. Together, Bali and Gili create a dream getaway filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments.

With Travelxploria’s seamless service, continue your journey to Lombok Island after a hearty breakfast. Our representative will escort you to the jetty for a speedboat transfer from Gili Trawangan to Teluk Kode, Lombok. Upon arrival, our experienced local guide will take you to Baun Pusuk (Monkey Forest), where playful monkeys roam freely. Next, trek to the majestic Sendang Gile Waterfall at the base of Mount Rinjani, a stunning natural retreat. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant before returning to Gili Trawangan by speedboat. Spend the evening at leisure, soaking in the island’s charm. Overnight stay in Gili.

​After a delightful breakfast, embark on a fascinating Sasak Traditional Tour with Travelxploria’s expert guide and on-ground support team. Begin at Banyumulek Village, famous for its exquisite handcrafted pottery, and continue to Sukarara Village, where skilled artisans weave intricate Songket cloth using age-old techniques. Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant before heading to Rambitan Village, where you’ll experience the unique architecture and culture of the Sasak people. Finally, soak in the breathtaking beauty of Kuta and Tanjung A’an Beaches. After a day of cultural discovery and scenic wonders, return for a relaxing overnight stay in Gili.​

packages.overview:
Imagine stepping off the plane in Denpasar and feeling the warm Hawaiian breeze of Bali envelop you—this is where Travelxploria’s expertly curated seven-day sojourn begins. As your private guide whisks you to the clifftop temple of Uluwatu at sunset, you’ll witness waves crashing beneath ancient stone guardians, all while learning the legends that make Bali the “Island of Gods.” The next morning, stroll through emerald rice terraces in Ubud with a local agrarian, then savor authentic ayam betutu at a family-run warung. Midweek, we’ll board a speedboat to Nusa Penida, where crystal-clear waters beckon you to snorkel alongside manta rays and explore hidden sea caves. Adventure continues as you chase hidden waterfalls in the heart of the jungle before an evening of traditional kecak dance under a starlit sky. Throughout your journey, Travelxploria guarantees seamless transfers, handpicked boutique hotels, and heartfelt encounters—from a Balinese cooking class in a countryside villa to a rejuvenating massage inspired by ancient healing rituals. By the time you bid farewell, Bali’s enchanting beauty and Travelxploria’s warm hospitality will have woven an experience that lingers in your heart—and calls you back to the tropics again and again.

​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, preparing for an unforgettable Ubud sightseeing adventure.Our dedicated representative will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.Immerse yourself in the artistic soul of Ubud Village, known for its vibrant culture and traditional craftsmanship. Stroll through the lush Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a stunning landscape of cascading greenery. Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.

Then, explore the lush Tegalalang Rice Fields, where endless greenery creates a serene escape. Wander through the Ubud Monkey Forest and meet its playful macaques before soaring on the Aloha Swing—choose from Chair, Single, or Ship for an unforgettable thrill. Stroll through the vibrant Ubud Village, soaking in its rich culture. Experience Ubud’s beauty in a scenic Jeep ride, guided by experienced team and best on-ground support staff. With smooth pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria ensures a hassle-free adventure—because we always give you the best experience for your tour.

Your friendly and knowledgeable representative will ensure you experience the spiritual beauty of this iconic site. Next, head to the famous Handara Gate, a perfect blend of nature and Balinese architecture, offering a picture-perfect moment. Continue your journey to Tanah Lot Temple, an ancient sea temple perched on a rocky cliff, where you can witness a breathtaking sunset over the Indian Ocean. Conclude your day with a flavorsome Indian dinner, before returning to your comfortable hotel in Kuta.​

packages.overview:
Bali, often called the "Island of the Gods," is a tropical paradise known for its breathtaking landscapes, vibrant culture, and warm hospitality. With its pristine beaches, lush rice terraces, and majestic temples, Bali offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and spiritual experiences. From the bustling streets of Kuta and Seminyak to the serene charm of Ubud’s jungles and waterfalls, every corner of the island has something unique to offer. Whether you're exploring ancient temples, enjoying thrilling water sports, or indulging in Balinese cuisine, Bali captivates every traveler with its unparalleled beauty and rich traditions.

​

packages.overview:
Imagine landing in Denpasar and stepping into Bali’s spiritual embrace—this is where Travelxploria’s tailor-made seven-day escapade unfolds. As your chauffeur escorts you to a cliff-top villa near Uluwatu, you’ll witness the sun casting golden hues over the “Island of the Gods” while ancient stone guardians stand sentinel. Mornings begin with a guided trek through emerald rice terraces in Tegallalang, learning age-old irrigation secrets from local farmers, then continue with bespoke yoga sessions overlooking Mount Agung’s mist-shrouded peak. Dive into crystal-clear waters off Nusa Lembongan, snorkeling among colourful coral gardens, or board a traditional jukung boat at dawn to chase the sunrise over the horizon. By day three, you’ll be immersed in Balinese culture—joining a temple blessing ceremony at Besakih, mastering intricate dance moves in a private workshop, and sampling mouthwatering lawar and satay at a family-run warung. Evenings sparkle with handcrafted cocktails beneath swaying palms, while Travelxploria arranges intimate beachside dinners complete with gamelan musicians. With seamless transfers, handpicked boutique sanctuaries, and heartfelt local encounters—from a cooking demonstration in a countryside estate to a sunset Kecak fire dance—Travelxploria ensures every moment in Bali feels both effortless and enchanted, leaving you longing to return to this unforgettable paradise.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

Upon arrival, check into your hotel in Ubud, a cultural haven known for its artistic heritage and tranquil ambiance. Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, preparing for an unforgettable Ubud sightseeing adventure.Our dedicated representative will pick you up from your hotel, ensuring a seamless start to your journey.Immerse yourself in the artistic soul of Ubud Village, known for its vibrant culture and traditional craftsmanship. Stroll through the lush Tegallalang Rice Terraces, a stunning landscape of cascading greenery. Next, marvel at the majestic views of Mount Batur and Lake Batur from the Kintamani Volcano viewpoint, where the breathtaking scenery leaves you in awe. Feel the essence of Bali’s rich heritage and natural beauty at every stop. Capture unforgettable momentsas you explore this enchanting region. As the day draws to a close, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free experience.

Your day begins with a hotel pick-up by our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide, who will ensure a seamless and enjoyable journey. Arrive at the famous Bali Swing, where you can soar high above lush jungles, tropical valleys, and rice terraces, capturing stunning photos of Bali’s breathtaking landscapes. Enjoy the adrenaline rush as you swing over the picturesque scenery, creating magical moments. With the best on-ground support staff, your experience will be smooth, safe, and truly exhilarating. After an exciting adventure, relax and enjoy the scenic surroundings before our representative drops you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable experience.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Lempuyang Temple and Tirta Gangga with Travelxploria, the best travel agency, ensuring you an unforgettable Balinese adventure. Your day begins with a hotel pick-up by our friendly representative and expert tour guide, who will provide insights into Bali’s rich culture and traditions. Visit the iconic Lempuyang Temple, home to the famous \"Gates of Heaven,\" where you can capture mesmerizing photos with Mount Agung as your backdrop. Next, explore the enchanting Tirta Gangga Water Palace, known for its royal gardens, sacred fountains, and koi-filled ponds. Enjoy the serene atmosphere and take in the beauty of Bali’s cultural heritage. Conclude your journey with a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day in Bali.

packages.package_name: Romantic Escapes and Magnificent Adventures in Bali
packages.overview:
Bali is more than just a destination—it’s a dreamscape of breathtaking landscapes, rich traditions, and warm hospitality. From the lush rice terraces of Ubud to the vibrant beaches of Kuta and the serene shores of Gili, every corner of this island paradise has something special to offer. Explore ancient temples like Uluwatu and Tanah Lot, witness mesmerizing cultural performances, and indulge in world-class cuisine. Whether you're seeking adventure, relaxation, or spiritual awakening, Bali's charm is undeniable. With its stunning sunsets, friendly locals, and endless beauty, Bali isn't just a place you visit—it’s a place you feel, a place you never forget.

​

Our experienced tour guide will take you to Padang Padang Beach, a surfer’s paradise with its iconic rock entrance. Visit the majestic Pura Luhur Uluwatu Temple, perched on a cliff with breathtaking ocean views. Discover Garuda Wisnu Kencana Park, home to the towering Vishnu statue. Unwind at Bingin Beach, famous for its surf and golden sunsets, before exploring Sanur Night Market or Jimbaran Corner for unique souvenirs. For adventure seekers, try cliff jumping at Karang Boma, scuba diving at Bingin Beach, or surfing at Padang Padang. End the day with a delightful meal at Café La Pasion or the 360 Restaurant, offering panoramic sunset views. With the best support, seamless transfers, and personalized experiences, your Uluwatu experience will be nothing short of extraordinary.

If you choose this exhilarating experience, our expert guide will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a seamless journey to the famous Bali Swing in Ubud—one of the most sought-after attractions in Bali. Feel the adrenaline rush as you soar high above lush tropical jungles, cascading waterfalls, and emerald-green rice terraces. This adventure offers various swing options, from single swings to romantic swings, providing breathtaking panoramic views. Capture Instagram-worthy moments as you glide above the stunning Ayung River valley. Whether you embrace this adventure or prefer a tranquil day, move for a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable Bali memories.

Begin your day at Busungbiu Rice Terraces, where rolling green fields meet misty mountain backdrops. Next, set out for Lovina Beach at sunrise for an unforgettable dolphin-watching experience as the morning sky glows golden. Continue to Sekumpul Waterfall, a hidden gem with seven cascades, perfect for trekking and a refreshing swim. Discover the beauty of Fiji Waterfall, a mesmerizing triple waterfall surrounded by dense bamboo forests. Conclude your adventure at the enchanting Ulun Danu Beratan Temple, a sacred lakeside sanctuary floating on Lake Beratan, where the cool mountain air and serene waters create a truly peaceful atmosphere.​

Embark on a scenic journey to Nusa Lembongan, with Travelxploria’s experienced guide ensuring a seamless transfer. A comfortable ride from Lahangan Sweet, followed by a short boat trip, brings you to this tropical paradise. Begin your exploration with a tranquil Mangrove Forest boat ride, where you can spot vibrant marine life and local wildlife. Witness the dramatic waves at Devil’s Tear, an awe-inspiring coastal cliff, best enjoyed at sunset. Stroll along the powdery shores of Mushroom Bay, known for its serene ambiance and oceanfront accommodations. Cross the iconic Yellow Bridge to Nusa Ceningan, soaking in panoramic views. Finally, unwind at Selambung Beach, a lively spot lined with fishing boats and charming cafés. With the best on-ground support team, enjoy hassle-free pick-ups, guided tours, and insider recommendations for an unforgettable island escape.

On your final day, embark on a smooth 2.5-hour journey from Nusa Lembongan to Canggu, with Travelxploria’s expert guide ensuring a hassle-free transfer. Unwind at Canggu Beach, where volcanic black sand meets world-class surfing waves. Stroll along Batu Bolong Beach, a serene coastal stretch offering breathtaking sunset views. For adventure seekers, Berawa Beach promises thrilling waves for intermediate surfers. Cool off at Taman Segara Madu, a fun-filled water park with slides and an Olympic-sized pool. Wrap up your journey with a visit to the Canggu Rice Terraces, where lush green fields showcase Bali’s rich agricultural heritage. With the best support, seamless pickups, and personalized service, enjoy every moment before your farewell to this enchanting island.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

Sink into the comfort of your cozy bed or indulge in a soothing warm bath, letting the memories of your incredible Bali adventure wash over you. From breathtaking landscapes to vibrant culture and heartfelt experiences, every moment has been unforgettable. As you prepare for your journey home, cherish the beautiful sunsets, serene temples, and warm Balinese hospitality that have made this trip so special. With a heart full of cherished memories, this farewell isn’t a goodbye—it’s a promise to return to this cultural and spiritual paradise once again. Until next time, Bali!

packages.package_name: Beautiful Bali: Where Serenity Meets Adventure
packages.overview:
Bali, the Island of the Gods, offers a perfect mix of culture, adventure, and relaxation. Ubud is the heart of Balinese traditions, known for its lush rice terraces, sacred temples, and vibrant arts scene. Kuta, famous for its golden beaches and exciting nightlife, is perfect for surfing and shopping. Meanwhile, Nusa Penida boasts breathtaking landscapes, including Kelingking Beach, Broken Beach, and Angel’s Billabong, with dramatic cliffs and crystal-clear waters. Whether exploring Ubud’s serene charm, experiencing Kuta’s lively energy, or discovering Nusa Penida’s raw beauty, Bali offers a journey filled with unforgettable moments and stunning scenery.

​

[{"city":"Kuta","country":"Indonesia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Kuta/1744999781779-AdobeStock_151461577-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Kuta/1744999783195-AdobeStock_169840623-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Kuta/1744999783483-AdobeStock_292919301-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Indonesia/Kuta/1744999783663-AdobeStock_396432810-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Bali -Welcome to the island of Gods ","day_summary":"

Your unforgettable Bali adventure begins the moment you arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport, where Travelxploria’s friendly representative will be waiting to give you a warm welcome. With seamless pick-up service, our experienced tour guide and on-ground support staff ensure a smooth transfer to your luxurious hotel, villa, or resort. Sit back and relax as you take in the tropical surroundings on your way. After check-in, unwind at your leisure—explore nearby markets, take a refreshing dip in the pool, or simply soak in the island’s tranquility. Rest well for the exciting days ahead in this paradise.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast, then set off with Travelxploria’s experienced guide for an action-packed adventure. First, head to the Ayung River in Ubud for an exhilarating white-water rafting experience. After a safety briefing, navigate 10 km of thrilling class II & III rapids, surrounded by lush forests, cascading waterfalls, and emerald rice fields. Next, explore the Sacred Monkey Forest, home to cheeky macaques and ancient temples. Take in the breathtaking Tegalalang Rice Terraces before visiting the historic Ubud Palace. Shop for unique Balinese arts and crafts at Ubud Market before returning to your hotel, villa, or resort for the night.

packages.overview:
Welcome to Kuta, Bali’s most vibrant beachside playground—where golden sands meet rolling surf, and every sunset feels like a celebration. With Travelxploria, dive into the heart of Bali’s energy, where the days are sun-drenched, and the nights are unforgettable.

Learn to ride the famous Kuta waves, unwind with a traditional Balinese spa, or simply soak in the laid-back vibe of the beach. For shoppers and culture seekers, explore the stylish Beachwalk Shopping Center or browse handcrafted treasures at the Kuta Art Market.

As day turns to night, the energy shifts—beachfront clubs, rooftop lounges, and live music venues light up the coast, creating a nightlife scene as electric as the sunset views.

Whether you're chasing waves, indulging in retail therapy, or dancing under the stars, Travelxploria ensures your Kuta experience is curated for comfort, excitement, and tropical bliss.
Let’s fly to your dream destination—Kuta awaits.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.package_name: Romantic Bali Escape: Unforgettable Moments of Ubud & Kuta
packages.overview: Bali, the "Island of the Gods," isn’t just a destination—it’s a love story waiting to be written. Imagine strolling hand in hand along the golden shores of Nusa Dua as the sun melts into the horizon, or sharing a private candlelit dinner beneath Uluwatu’s cliffside temple, where waves whisper ancient secrets. Escape into the lush embrace of Ubud’s emerald rice terraces, where hidden waterfalls and flower-filled pools create the perfect setting for romance. Set sail on a sunset cruise, champagne in hand, as the ocean breeze carries your dreams into the starlit sky. From intimate jungle retreats to floating breakfasts in infinity pools, Bali elevates love into an art form. Whether it's a serene morning in a floating bamboo villa or an adventurous scooter ride through misty highlands, every moment in Bali feels like a scene from a timeless romance—one that lingers long after you leave.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast before our representative from Travelxploria picks you up for an unforgettable Seminyak tour, blending culture, shopping, and beachside relaxation. Begin at the Petitenget Temple, a centuries-old Balinese gem adorned with intricate carvings and offering breathtaking ocean views, where you’ll learn about its spiritual significance. Stroll through Seminyak Square, a vibrant hub of boutique shops, art galleries, and trendy cafés, perfect for indulging in local crafts and designer finds. Relax at Double Six Beach, a stunning stretch of golden sand, ideal for sunbathing or trying thrilling water sports like surfing and parasailing. Stop by La Plancha, an iconic beachfront bar with colorful bean bags, tropical cocktails, and panoramic sunset views. As the evening falls soak in the golden hues at Seminyak Beach, capturing worthy moments. Finally,return to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Seminyak’s coastal charm.

​Experience Bali’s cultural and natural wonders with our seamless service and best-in-class support. Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, then our Travelxploria representative will pick you up for a visit to Garuda Wisnu Kencana (GWK) Cultural Park, home to the majestic Garuda Wisnu statue. Next, relax at the picturesque Padang Padang Beach, known for its golden sands and turquoise waters. In the evening, visit the stunning Uluwatu Temple, perched on a cliff overlooking the ocean. Witness the mesmerizing Kecak Fire Dance at sunset, a must-see Balinese performance. Conclude your day at Melasti Beach, before returning with hassle-free transfers, ensuring a magical Bali experience .​

packages.overview:
Escape to the tropical paradise of Bali with Travelxploria, a leading travel agency based in Kolkata, India. Immerse yourself in the enchanting beauty of this Indonesian island, known for its stunning beaches, lush rice terraces, and vibrant culture.

Travelxploria offers meticulously crafted Bali tour packages, ensuring an unforgettable experience tailored to your preferences. Explore the iconic rice fields of Ubud, where tranquility and natural beauty converge. Discover ancient temples like Tanah Lot and Uluwatu, perched on dramatic cliffs overlooking the sparkling Indian Ocean.

Indulge in the unique cultural experiences that Bali has to offer. Witness traditional dance performances, participate in Balinese cooking classes, or rejuvenate your mind and body with yoga and meditation retreats. Bali’s spirituality and artistic heritage create a captivating ambiance that lingers long after your visit.

The Kecak Fire Danceis one of Bali’s most mesmerizing cultural performances, and witnessing it at Uluwatu Templemakes it even more magical. Set against the backdrop of the stunning ocean sunset, this traditional Balinese dance-dramatells the epic tale of the Ramayana, featuring Prince Rama, his beloved Sita, and the mighty Hanuman battling the evil King Ravana. What makes this performance unique is the hypnotic chorus of over 70 men, rhythmically chanting “chak-chak-chak” as they form a living orchestra without any instruments. As the story unfolds, dramatic movements, intricate costumes, and fiery visuals captivate the audience. The climax features Hanuman playfully dancing through flames, adding to the thrilling experience. This enchanting performance, held in an open-airamphitheater atop Uluwatu’s cliff, offers a breathtaking fusion of storytelling, culture, and nature. After the show, soak in the magical atmosphere before a smooth ride back to your hotel with Travelxploria.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.package_name: Island of the Gods: A Bali Odyssey
packages.overview:
Bali offers a perfect blend of cultural richness and beachside excitement, with Ubud and Kuta as two must-visit destinations. Ubud, the island’s cultural heart, is surrounded by lush rice terraces, ancient temples, and vibrant art markets. Explore the famous Tegalalang Rice Terrace, Ubud Palace, and Monkey Forest, or indulge in a rejuvenating spa experience. In contrast, Kuta is Bali’s energetic coastal hub, known for its golden beaches, world-class surfing, buzzing nightlife, and shopping streets. Whether you seek relaxation in Ubud’s serene landscapes or adventure in Kuta’s lively atmosphere, Travelxploria’s seamless services ensure a hassle-free and unforgettable Bali experience.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast before embarking on an unforgettable Nusa Penida East Island Tour with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel and ensure a seamless transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this breathtaking island. Upon arrival, our expert guide will take you to Diamond Beach, famous for its white sandy shores and turquoise waters, followed by a visit to Atuh Beach, a secluded paradise surrounded by dramatic cliffs. Next, explore the iconic Tree House (Rumah Pohon) and soak in the panoramic beauty from the Thousand Islands Viewpoint, offering some of the most breathtaking vistas in Bali. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the island’s flavors amid nature’s beauty. As the sun begins to set, unwind on your return journey, followed by a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

packages.package_name: Uncover the Charm of Thailand Islands
packages.overview:
Discover Thailand’s Best with Travelxploria: Phi Phi Islands, Koh Samui, and Bangkok Adventure

Experience the vibrant charm of Thailand with Travelxploria on a tour that takes you from the crystal-clear waters of Phi Phi Islands to the serene beauty of Koh Samui and the cultural wonders of Bangkok.

Start your journey with a thrilling Phi Phi Island Tour. Cruise through the turquoise waters and visit Maya Bay, famous for its stunning scenery. Explore the awe-inspiring Viking Cave, a hidden gem, and enjoy unforgettable moments amidst the islands’ natural beauty.

Next, head to Koh Samui, Thailand’s second-largest island. Unwind at a luxurious resort, indulge in the lively nightlife at Ark Bar, and take in the island’s charm. Embark on a sightseeing tour to the iconic Big Buddha, the sacred Wat Khunaram, and the breathtaking vistas of Ang Thong Marine Park, a paradise of pristine beaches and emerald lagoons.

Your journey concludes in Bangkok, Thailand’s capital, where you’ll dive into the rich heritage of the city. Visit the majestic Grand Palace, the serene Wat Pho, and the iconic Wat Arun, capturing the essence of Thailand’s cultural treasures.

This tour offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and heritage, ensuring a memorable experience of Thailand’s most captivating destinations.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

After breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative greets you at your hotel lobby and leads you on a captivating half-day tour through the heart of Bangkok. Your journey begins at the magnificent Golden Buddha, where its radiant gold glow inspires a sense of peace and reverence, before moving on to the serene Mahaputra Temple, a haven of intricate artistry and spiritual calm. packages.package_name: Thai Island Trilogy: Phuket, Krabi & Koh Samui Escape
packages.overview:
​Travelxploria’s Andaman & Gulf Island Escape sweeps you from Phuket’s vibrant shores to Krabi’s hidden coves and the laid-back charms of Koh Samui—all in one seamless journey. Begin in Phuket, where powder-white sands meet turquoise seas: rise early for a snorkeling excursion to Coral Island’s rainbow reefs, unwind on Patong Beach with a beachside massage, then toast the sunset from a hilltop viewpoint before savoring fresh seafood at a cliff-side restaurant.

Next, drift south to Krabi’s dramatic limestone cliffs: board a traditional longtail boat at dawn to explore the tranquil lagoons of Hong Island, climb the “Tiger Cave” for panoramic views over emerald jungles, and plunge into the cool waters of Railay Beach’s hidden grottoes. As dusk falls, gather around a beach bonfire to admire bioluminescent plankton dancing at your toes.

Finally, hop across the gulf to Koh Samui, where coconut palms sway above secret bays. Spend your mornings kayaking through Ang Thong Marine Park’s karst-strewn islands, indulge in a beachside yoga session as the sun rises, and explore the island’s spiritual side at the Big Buddha Temple. Treat your taste buds to Samui’s famous fresh-pressed coconut curries and mango sticky rice, then dance the night away at a chic beachfront lounge under stars.

From snorkeling and sea-cave adventures to cultural encounters and island-hopping bliss, Travelxploria’s bespoke tour weaves together Thailand’s most iconic beach escapes into an unforgettable island odyssey.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Leave the vibrant shores of Phuket behind as our Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth and comfortable transfer to the breathtaking paradise of Krabi. As you journey through scenic coastal roads, soak in the picturesque landscapes of limestone cliffs and emerald waters. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and take a moment to relax.

Immerse yourself in the vibrant essence of Krabi as a friendly Travelxploria representative collects you from your hotel to begin an engaging city tour. Journey through bustling streets adorned with ancient temples, colorful local markets, and scenic riverfronts that showcase the authentic spirit of Krabi. Discover cultural treasures like Wat Kaew Korawaram and witness everyday life unfolding amid charming neighborhoods where traditional crafts and modern touches blend seamlessly. Capture unforgettable moments as you stroll past lively street scenes, sampling local flavors and soaking in the rich heritage of this dynamic city. This immersive tour offers a captivating glimpse into Krabi’s timeless charm and leaves you with cherished memories of its unique cultural tapestry.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Embark on a full-day adventure with Travelxploria to the breathtaking Angthong Marine National Park, a stunning 250-square-kilometer paradise northwest of Koh Samui. Our representative will ensure a seamless experience as you set sail on a shared big boat toward Angthong Island, where nature’s beauty awaits. Explore Mae Koh, home to a picturesque beach and the mesmerizing emerald saltwater lake, Thale Nai. Savor a delightful lunch at Koh Paluay, an island untouched by modern development. Later, indulge in activities like swimming, sunbathing, canoeing, or simply unwinding on pristine white sands, making the most of this unforgettable tropical escape.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Jungle Safari at Koh Samui","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exhilarating jungle safari jeep tour with Travelxploria, taking you through the heart of Koh Samui’s untouched wilderness. Our representative will ensure a seamless adventure as you hop onto a 4x4 off-road ride, navigating through lush jungles and uncovering the island’s hidden gems. Feel the thrill of exploring the rugged outback, where nature thrives in its purest form. Take a refreshing break beneath a cascading waterfall, letting the cool waters rejuvenate you. This adventure blends adrenaline, scenic beauty, and relaxation, offering an unforgettable way to experience Koh Samui’s untamed side.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day ","day_summary":"

As the journey comes to an end, start your morning with a delightful breakfast, savoring the last moments of your incredible trip. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to ensure a smooth and comfortable transfer to the airport, assisting you every step of the way. As you head for your flight back home, take with you cherished memories of your journey.

packages.package_name: Romantic Tour of Phuket and Krabi
packages.overview: Embark on a sun-soaked, four-night escape with Travelxploria: start with two nights in vibrant Phuket, where you’ll wander colorful local markets, dive into the pulsating nightlife of Bangla Road, and unwind on golden shores before setting sail on a full-day Phi Phi Island adventure—snorkeling in crystal-clear bays, stepping ashore at iconic Maya Bay, and soaking up seaside panoramas. Then it’s off to Krabi for two nights of island hopping: explore the stunning Four Islands—Phra Nang Cave Beach’s limestone cliffs, Chicken Island’s photogenic rock formations, Poda Island’s powder-white sands, and the secluded Tup Island sandbar—interspersed with scenic boat rides and optional water sports. Throughout your journey, balance thrilling excursions with blissful beach days and sunset cocktails, all seamlessly arranged so you can simply relax, explore, and make unforgettable memories.

Resort & Villas Krabi.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day 4 Islands tour by by Long tail boat with Lunch","day_summary":"

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Begin your day with a delightful journey that seamlessly blends spiritual discovery with natural rejuvenation in Krabi. After a satisfying breakfast, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s trusted travel experts—and whisked away to the revered Tiger Cave Temple. Here, a climb through lush jungle pathways leads you to breathtaking panoramic views, setting the stage for an inspiring cultural encounter. Your adventure continues as you explore the enchanting Emerald Pool, a natural turquoise oasis nestled deep within the forest, inviting you for a refreshing dip in its crystal-clear waters. The tour culminates at the soothing Hot Springs, where steaming mineral-rich waters provide the perfect retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of cultural insight and natural wonder, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Krabi’s diverse and captivating landscapes.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview: Embark on a captivating Thailand escape with Travelxploria, where ancient pageantry and island paradise blend seamlessly into one unforgettable journey. Your adventure begins under a canopy of light and sound at the Siam Niramit Show, then at dawn you’ll set sail for Phi Phi Island’s ivory sands and turquoise waters, snorkeling vibrant coral reefs and hopping between hidden coves framed by towering limestone cliffs. From seaside thrills you’ll travel to Phuket’s storied heart—standing in awe before the marble serenity of the Big Buddha, exploring the gilded halls of Wat Chalong, and wandering the pastel streets of Old Phuket Town in search of fiery satay, sweet roti, and cooling iced tea. With insider access, seamless transfers, and the warmth of small-group camaraderie, Travelxploria ensures every moment—from epic legends to island dreams—becomes a lasting memory.

As you arrive in the breathtaking paradise of Phuket, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your journey. Sit back and relax as you’re comfortably transferred to your hotel, where a smooth check-in at hotel in Bangkok. Take some time to unwind.

Later embark on an enchanting evening as you're collected from your hotel by a gracious Travelxploria representative—the trusted name in Thai travel—and whisked away to the mesmerizing Siam Niramit Phuket Show. Begin your night by indulging in an exquisite Thai-Western fusion feast, presented in an elegant buffet that delights both the palate and the senses. As darkness falls, witness a breathtaking spectacle where state-of-the-art technology harmonizes with age-old traditions on one of the world’s most dazzling stages. Capture vibrant snapshots of performers clad in traditional Thai attire, each moment more vivid than the last, and immerse yourself in a cultural walkthrough that unveils the rich tapestry of Thailand's heritage. With seamless, hassle-free transfers ensuring your comfort, this unforgettable experience promises to leave you with cherished memories of a truly magical evening.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at the hotel as our Travelxploria representative ensures you have everything you need for a relaxing and flexible day in Phuket. Today is yours to explore at your own pace—whether you choose to wander through the charming Phuket Walking Street in Old Town, shop for souvenirs at Jungceylon Mall, or simply soak in the island’s vibrant energy. Take in the sights, indulge in delicious street food, or unwind by the beach. As the day winds down, return to your hotel for a delicious dinner and a peaceful overnight stay.

packages.overview:
• James Bond Island – Cruise through emerald waters, explore iconic caves, and relish a delicious seafood lunch onboard.
  • Pattaya Transfer – Fly to Pattaya, unwind at your hotel, and embrace the vibrant coastal vibes.
  • Coral Island – Bask in the sun, dive into thrilling water sports, and enjoy a scenic beachfront lunch.
  • Bangkok City Tour – Marvel at the Golden Buddha, visit Gems Gallery, and admire the Marble Temple’s architecture.
  • Dreamworld & Snow Town – Experience thrilling rides, magical lands, and a snowy winter wonderland in tropical Bangkok.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

Upon arrival, you’ll be warmly welcomed and guided through a hassle-free hotel check-in. Take some time to settle in and unwind in the comfort of your accommodation.

Afterwards, our representative will lead you on a captivating half-day tour through the heart of Bangkok. Your journey begins at the magnificent Golden Buddha, where its radiant gold glow inspires a sense of peace and reverence, before moving on to the serene Mahaputra Temple, a haven of intricate artistry and spiritual calm. The adventure continues at the dazzling Gems Gallery, where you are mesmerized by a vibrant display of cultural treasures and sparkling history. As the morning unfolds with enriching encounters and awe-inspiring sights, you are comfortably returned to your hotel in the afternoon, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Bangkok’s unique heritage.

After a hearty breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative meets you at your hotel lobby, setting the stage for a day of wonder at Dream World Bangkok. Your adventure begins as you’re whisked away to a land where imagination meets thrill—a place where roller coaster loops and enchanting themed zones effortlessly transport you back to the magic of childhood. Lose yourself in a vibrant world of exhilarating rides and captivating shows, each corner designed to spark joy and fuel your sense of adventure. With seamless transfers and an atmosphere brimming with excitement, this tour promises an unforgettable escape into the heart of Bangkok’s most playful amusement park.

Experience a magical winter escape at Snow Town, where you can enjoy snowball fights, sledding, and ice skating in a charming snowy setting. Feel the thrill of winter activities in the heart of Bangkok. After a fun-filled adventure, our representative will ensure a comfortable transfer back to your hotel for a relaxing overnight stay.

packages.package_name: Best of Phuket Krabi Holiday Package
packages.overview:
• Transfer to Krabi – Begin your journey with a scenic transfer to Krabi, where relaxation and tropical beauty await.
  • Krabi Four Island Tour – Explore stunning islands, crystal-clear waters, and picturesque caves on this breathtaking island-hopping adventure.
  • Tiger Cave & Emerald Pool Tour – Discover Krabi’s lush rainforests, sacred temples, soothing hot springs, and the enchanting Emerald Pool.
  • Transfer to Phuket & Fantasea Show – Enjoy a cultural extravaganza at Phuket Fantasea, featuring dazzling performances and a grand buffet dinner.
  • Phi Phi Island Tour – Sail to paradise, swim in turquoise waters, and snorkel among vibrant marine life on this unforgettable island tour.
  • Phuket City Tour – Uncover Phuket’s charm with panoramic viewpoints, majestic temples, and rich cultural heritage on an immersive sightseeing journey.

Sit back and enjoy the scenic journey as you pass lush landscapes and turquoise waters. Upon arrival, check in at your comfortable hotel and unwind at your own pace. Spend the evening soaking in the serene vibes, strolling along the beach, or simply relaxing at your resort. Whether you choose to explore or rest, the beauty of Krabi will set the perfect tone for your trip. Enjoy a peaceful overnight stay in Krabi.
