After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Begin your day with a delightful journey that seamlessly blends spiritual discovery with natural rejuvenation in Krabi. After a satisfying breakfast, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s trusted travel experts—and whisked away to the revered Tiger Cave Temple. Here, a climb through lush jungle pathways leads you to breathtaking panoramic views, setting the stage for an inspiring cultural encounter. Your adventure continues as you explore the enchanting Emerald Pool, a natural turquoise oasis nestled deep within the forest, inviting you for a refreshing dip in its crystal-clear waters. The tour culminates at the soothing Hot Springs, where steaming mineral-rich waters provide the perfect retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of cultural insight and natural wonder, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Krabi’s diverse and captivating landscapes.

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to the serene beauty of Krabi. Our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out and ensure a smooth transfer to Phuket, Thailand’s largest and most vibrant island. Enjoy the scenic journey as you pass emerald waters and stunning coastal views. Upon arrival, check in at your carefully selected hotel and take a moment to relax. Enjoy a restful stay.

In the evening, you'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to embark on an unforgettable Phuket FantaSea tour. As one of the best tour operators in the region, we ensure a smooth and memorable journey as you are transported to this dazzling cultural theme park. Upon arrival, you’ll be immersed in a spectacular show that brings Thailand's rich heritage to life through captivating performances, intricate costumes, acrobatics, and breathtaking pyrotechnics. The magical atmosphere of Phuket FantaSea, with its unique blend of tradition and fantasy, promises an evening full of wonder and excitement. After experiencing the enchantment of the night, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, leaving you with lasting memories of Thailand’s vibrant cultural spirit.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

packages.overview: Travelxploria welcomes you to Thailand’s kaleidoscope of color and calm, where every sunrise heralds a new adventure. Glide through the emerald channels of Krabi’s mangrove forests on a private longtail boat, pausing to swim in hidden lagoons framed by towering limestone cliffs. Swap sea breezes for city buzz in Phuket’s Old Town, where Sino-Portuguese façades glow in sunset light as you savor street-stall classics like spicy tom yum and mango sticky rice. Journey inland to the mist-shrouded hills of Chiang Mai, where you’ll learn ancient temple rituals from friendly monks before trekking alongside gentle giants in an ethical elephant sanctuary. As night falls, drift lanterns down the Mae Ping River during Loy Krathong, and feel your worries float away under a sky of firelit wishes. From boutique beachfront villas to mountain-top meditation sessions, every detail—transfers, guides, and local encounters—is handpicked by Travelxploria, crafting a Thailand experience that’s as vibrant and diverse as the land itself.

packages.package_name: Exotic Island Tour of Phuket and Krabi
packages.overview:
Phuket is a vibrant coastal hub, known for its lively markets, rich cultural heritage, and pristine beaches that offer both relaxation and adventure. It boasts a dynamic nightlife scene alongside world-class dining and shopping experiences. In contrast, Krabi offers a more tranquil escape, with dramatic limestone cliffs, hidden coves, and turquoise waters that invite exploration and outdoor adventures. The natural beauty of its islands creates a serene backdrop perfect for activities like snorkeling, kayaking, and rock climbing. Together, these destinations present a diverse and enriching travel experience that blends urban energy with natural splendor.

  • ​Phuket City Tour: Explore the vibrant streets and historic landmarks that capture the essence of local culture.
  • ​James Bond Island Tour: Experience cinematic splendor as you cruise through breathtaking seascapes to the iconic island.
  • ​Hong Island Tour: Discover hidden lagoons and emerald waters on an intimate tour of this tropical gem.​​

Embark on an enchanting evening as you're collected from your hotel by a gracious Travelxploria representative—the trusted name in Thai travel—and whisked away to the mesmerizing Siam Niramit Phuket Show. Begin your night by indulging in an exquisite Thai-Western fusion feast, presented in an elegant buffet that delights both the palate and the senses. As darkness falls, witness a breathtaking spectacle where state-of-the-art technology harmonizes with age-old traditions on one of the world’s most dazzling stages. You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Begin your day with a sumptuous buffet breakfast at your hotel, savoring local flavors before you’re whisked away by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s most trusted travel experts—for an unforgettable day trip from Krabi. Your journey begins at the breathtaking Hong Island, where rugged limestone cliffs rise majestically from crystalline turquoise waters, setting the stage for a day of tropical wonder. Delve into the serenity of Hong Lagoon, a hidden oasis where the gentle lapping of clear waters invites you to swim or simply bask in the natural splendor. The adventure continues as you explore Ko Pak Bia, a secluded paradise with sun-drenched shores and untouched beauty, and then move on to Ko Lao, where swaying palm trees and calm seascapes create a picture-perfect escape. Finally, the charming island of Lading offers pristine sandy stretches and vibrant marine life, making it an ideal spot for unforgettable photos. With each stop revealing a new facet of Krabi’s coastal magic, you’ll return to your hotel filled with vivid memories of nature’s splendor and a heart enriched by the enchanting beauty of these idyllic islands.

packages.overview:
• 2 nights in Phuket and 2 nights in Krabi for a perfect beach holiday.
  • Phi Phi Island tour with a visit to Maya Bay Beach, snorkeling, and crystal-clear waters.
  • 4 Islands Tour in Krabi covering Phra Nang Cave Beach, Chicken Island, Poda Island, and Tup Island.
  • Enjoy local markets, nightlife at Bangla Road, and serene beaches.
  • Scenic boat rides, water activities, and relaxing beach time throughout the trip.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview: Discover the captivating allure of Thailand with Travelxploria as your guide, where the vibrant metropolis of Bangkok meets the sun-drenched charm of Pattaya. In Bangkok, ancient traditions blend seamlessly with modern innovation—majestic temples, bustling markets, and a thriving culinary scene create an urban tapestry that's as rich in culture as it is in energy. Just a short journey away, Pattaya offers a refreshing coastal escape with its beautiful beaches, dynamic nightlife, and an exciting array of water sports, perfect for those seeking both relaxation and adventure. With Travelxploria's expertly curated insights, experience the diverse spirit of Thailand and immerse yourself in a unique fusion of history, excitement, and natural beauty that will leave a lasting impression.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

After breakfast, prepare for a scenic ferry transfer from Phuket to Krabi, a journey that combines comfort with spectacular views of the Andaman Sea. The ferry ride typically takes around 1.5 to 2.5 hours, depending on weather conditions and the ferry type, offering stunning sights of emerald waters, limestone islands, and coastal landscapes along the way. Departing from Rassada Pier in Phuket and arriving at Krabi’s Klong Jilad Pier, this route is both efficient and picturesque. Upon arrival, you'll be transferred to your hotel in Krabi, where the rest of the day is free for you to relax or explore at leisure.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Thailand adventure with Travelxploria, beginning with a thrilling speedboat ride to the stunning Coral Island, where you can dive into crystal-clear waters and exciting water sports. Immerse yourself in Thai culture at the lush Nong Nooch Village before traveling to vibrant Bangkok. Explore its treasures, from the dazzling Gems Gallery to the revered Golden Buddha and Reclining Buddha Temples, and enjoy shopping in the bustling markets. Experience the magic of Safari World & Marine Park’s wildlife shows and cap off your journey with a serene Chao Phraya River dinner cruise, taking in Bangkok’s glittering skyline.

[{"city":"Pattaya","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961601818-AdobeStock_174974335.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604012-AdobeStock_366309928.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604111-AdobeStock_1091251878.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Bangkok Transfer to Pattaya with Alcazar Show in Evening","day_summary":"

As you step into the vibrant city of Bangkok, the heart of Thailand, our Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you with a warm welcome. Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off. 

Afterwards head to Nong Nooch Village, where you’ll witness mesmerizing Thai Cultural and Elephant Shows, showcasing Thailand’s vibrant traditions. Wander through beautifully landscaped gardens and admire traditional performances that bring the country’s heritage to life. Later, unwind with a soothing 1-hour traditional Thai massage, allowing yourself to fully relax and rejuvenate.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

packages.overview:
• Dazzling Alcazar Show – Witness a spectacular, glamorous cabaret performance filled with dazzling costumes and mesmerizing acts.
  • Thrilling Coral Island Tour – Enjoy a speedboat ride, indulge in water sports, and relax on pristine white sandy beaches.
  • Explore Art in Paradise – Step into a world of interactive 3D art and capture surreal optical illusion photographs.
  • Visit the Big Buddha Temple – Experience serenity and breathtaking views from this revered cultural landmark.
  • Scenic Drive to Bangkok – Travel back to the bustling city, stopping at Gems Gallery to admire Thailand’s exquisite craftsmanship.
  • Bangkok Temple Tour – Discover iconic temples, including Wat Traimit, Wat Pho, and the magnificent Marble Temple.
  • Shopping Extravaganza – Explore Bangkok’s vibrant markets and high-end malls for souvenirs, fashion, and local crafts.
  • Optional Safari World & Marine Park – Encounter exotic wildlife, watch thrilling shows, and enjoy a delicious lunch.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off. 

Step into a world of illusion at Art in Paradise Pattaya, Thailand’s largest interactive 3D art museum, with Travelxploria, the leading travel agency in Thailand. Enjoy a hassle-free experience with hotel pick-up, guided by our friendly representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring you make the most of this immersive attraction. Walk through stunning hand-painted 3D artworks that let you become part of the scene—pose with wild animals, step into famous landmarks, or float in surreal landscapes. This interactive gallery is perfect for photography lovers and families looking for a fun and unique adventure. After exploring this magical space, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, this experience promises endless creativity, fun, and unforgettable memories.

Later visit the iconic Big Buddha Temple, a spiritual landmark offering breathtaking views and a sense of serenity. After a day of exploration, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay in Pattaya.

With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

Step into a world of illusion at Art in Paradise Pattaya, Thailand’s largest interactive 3D art museum, with Travelxploria, the leading travel agency in Thailand. Enjoy a hassle-free experience with hotel pick-up, guided by our friendly representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring you make the most of this immersive attraction. Walk through stunning hand-painted 3D artworks that let you become part of the scene—pose with wild animals, step into famous landmarks, or float in surreal landscapes. This interactive gallery is perfect for photography lovers and families looking for a fun and unique adventure. After exploring this magical space, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, this experience promises endless creativity, fun, and unforgettable memories.

Upon arrival in Bangkok, dive into the city’s rich heritage with visits to the Marble Temple, the revered Wat Traimit, home to the stunning Golden Buddha, and the iconic Wat Pho, famous for its majestic Reclining Buddha. After soaking in the spiritual ambiance, enjoy some free time for shopping, where you can pick up souvenirs before concluding this eventful day.

packages.overview:
• Sleek and spacious accommodations make Sun Siyam Iru Veli the ultimate tropical retreat. With front row lagoon views and a freshwater pool for every five star suite, all you have to do is check in, chill out and let our neighbouring dolphins provide your entertainment as they swim past each day.
  • From the moment you arrive, shoes are left at the door, so forget dress codes and come as you are. Here we live the barefoot idyll, so sit back and sink your toes into the softest white sand – it doesn’t get better than this.
  • Priding ourselves on innovation, our main restaurant has a daily-changing menu to mix up seasonal flavours, and we serve plenty of the ocean’s bounty with the best seafood you’ll ever taste. You can even watch exotic fish pass under the glass floor below as you sink into a relaxing massage. It’s time to discover the true meaning of rest and rejuvenation here on our sapphire waters.

[{"city":"Male","country":"Maldives","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963840668-AdobeStock_51524562.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963841857-AdobeStock_63675188.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Maldives/Male/1744963841988-AdobeStock_104056643.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Luxury – Beachfront Welcome","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Velana International Airport in Malé, you’ll be whisked away on a scenic 40-minute seaplane flight to the stunning island of Sun Siyam Iru Veli. After a warm Maldivian welcome, check into your spacious Beach Villa with a private pool, steps away from powder-soft sands and turquoise waters. Spend your afternoon soaking up the sun, dipping into your pool, or enjoying the tranquil beach. In the evening, enjoy a gourmet dinner at Aqua Orange, the resort’s all-day dining venue offering global cuisine in a beautiful lagoon-front setting.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Ferry","from":"Male Velena International Airport","to":"Male","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"5":[{"h_id":1385,"h_name":"Sun Siyam Iru Veli","h_country":"Maldives","h_city":"Male","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922654-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 5.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922686-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 4.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922758-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922801-Sun Siyam Iru Veli.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922805-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Male/Sun Siyam Iru Veli/1745910922829-Sun Siyam Iru Veli 2.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Water Sports, Wellness & Sunset Views","day_summary":"

Start your day with an ocean-view breakfast, then explore the lagoon with included non-motorized water sports like kayaking, snorkeling, or stand-up paddleboarding. For diving enthusiasts, consider booking an optional scuba excursion to the nearby coral reefs. In the afternoon, indulge in a luxurious treatment at Sun Siyam Spa, with its serene overwater pavilions and holistic therapies. Wrap up your day with sunset cocktails at Chemistry Bar followed by dinner at Grouper Grill, where fresh seafood is the star.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Adventure or Pure Relaxation – You Choose","day_summary":"

Enjoy your morning at leisure—opt for a sunrise beach walk, private yoga session, or simply lounge by your villa’s pool. After breakfast, embark on an optional dolphin-spotting cruise or sandbank picnic for a picture-perfect afternoon. If you prefer to stay on the island, relax at the infinity pool or join a wine-tasting session hosted by the resort’s sommelier. End your final night with a romantic private dining experience on the beach, under a blanket of stars.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure – Last Moments in Paradise","day_summary":"

Savor your final island breakfast and take in the peaceful atmosphere one last time. Enjoy a swim or short beach stroll before check-out. You’ll then board your return seaplane to Malé, carrying with you the serene memories of your 3-night beach villa escape at Sun Siyam Iru Veli.

packages.overview:
• Some escapes beckon you with a promise of serenity, where your everyday fades into the background while you immerse yourself in the rhythm of the island's heartbeat. Welcome to such an escape on a dreamy island hideaway, enveloped by uninterrupted hues of blue, nestled on a secluded stretch of sand in North Malé Atoll. A 40-minute speedboat ride away from Male lies this truly Maldivian experience, blending cultural elements with contemporary elegance and bursts of chic tropical vibes. It's a fairytale that feels a world away yet wrapped in homely warmth. Intimate yet larger than life, elevated with our heartwarming and discreet hospitality.

  • Your escape to paradise unfolds into a tantalising culinary journey plated just for you. Every dish tells a tale of diverse and exquisite tastes garnished with our magical touch. Our chefs bring culinary delights from around the world while staying rooted in the richness of authentic Maldivian cuisine. From tranquil sunset cocktails at Bay Rouge to the understated elegance of NÜ serving Mediterranean-style seafood, every dining spot is a unique gastronomic escape.

packages.overview:
• Some places are best experienced; where your eyes chase the endless expanse of the ocean while the soft sand caresses your feet and the crisp air fills your lungs with life. Where time moves lazily as sunshine sparkles on the turquoise waters and swaying palm trees serenade your senses. Welcome to such a slice of tropical luxury, nestled in the stunning yet sparsely populated Lhaviyani Atoll. A short seaplane ride from Male International Airport, our all-inclusive resort in the Maldives features luxurious villas amidst lush vegetation and the alluring Indian Ocean. The interiors feature contemporary Maldivian accents, overlooking crystal-clear waters underneath which a magical world of coral reefs awaits exploration. This is a tropical experience that is as unique as it is luxurious and one that will make you come back in a heartbeat.
  • Much like the diversity of our palm-fringed island, our dining experiences are teeming with unique culinary choices. From homely Sri Lankan cuisine to tantalising global flavours, from contemporary vegetarian delights to authentic Japanese teppanyaki, our chefs are delighted to plate for every discerning palate. We’re here to serve gastronomical experiences that make your heart full and appetite satiated but leave your taste buds longing for more.

packages.overview:
• Here at Furaveri Maldives, a premier luxury resort in Maldives, we offer a variety of cozy options for your stay, from entry level Garden Villas to luxurious Ocean Pool Villas and Residences, which have been specifically designed to meet guests individual preferences and are set among lush vegetation and over water, on a sandy white beach or settled above a sparkling turquoise lagoon.
  • Take experiences and adventures to the next level with our watersports team, Reyla Adventures. Our team offers a wide variety of motorized and non-motorized activities and excursions in the Maldives for you to live the adventure.

Wake up to the sound of gentle waves and enjoy a leisurely breakfast by the beach. Spend the morning exploring the island—bike through nature trails, visit the local hydroponic garden, or relax on the beach with a good book. After lunch, pamper yourself at Furaveri Spa, where holistic treatments are offered in a serene garden or overwater setting. As the sun begins to set, consider a sunset cruise or simply unwind with cocktails at the beach bar, followed by a delicious seafood dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Adventure or Serenity – Your Choice","day_summary":"

Today is yours to tailor. Opt for adventure with activities like kayaking, snorkeling at the house reef, or joining an excursion to nearby sandbanks and uninhabited islands. Alternatively, enjoy a relaxed day soaking in the sun, taking a yoga session, or joining a Maldivian cooking class. In the evening, treat yourself to a beachfront BBQ or romantic candlelight dinner by the ocean.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Furaveri","day_summary":"

On your final day in paradise, take an early morning beach walk and savor a tropical breakfast. Enjoy your last swim or a peaceful moment on your villa deck before checking out. You’ll then be transferred back to Malé via seaplane or domestic flight, leaving with lasting memories of your beachfront escape at Furaveri Maldives.

packages.package_name: Sheraton Maldives Full Moon Resort & Spa
packages.overview:
• Featuring effortless elegance in relaxing spaces, our Maldives family suites serve as your idyllic sanctuary after an adventure-filled day on the island. The resort offers a wide range of rooms, from understated deluxe rooms to charming cottages, boastful ocean pool villas, and indulging water villas.
  • Relax in our exquisite 74 sqm Water Villa with Pool, perfect for a serene retreat. This one-bedroom haven features premium amenities, a spacious day bed, private dining area, kitchen, and a beautifully designed bathroom. Enjoy classic decor and a stunning 180-degree view of the Indian Ocean, making it an ideal setting for an unforgettable escape.

Wind down your day with sunset cocktails at Anchorage Bar followed by dinner at Feast, featuring international cuisine and live cooking stations.

packages.overview:
• ​Experience pristine views of golden shores and turquoise waters at Adaaran Select Hudhuran Fushi, a Maldives Beach Resort with modern amenities and a vibrant ambiance. The Premium All Inclusive resort offers accommodation for surfers, honeymooners, and families and includes free excursions for stays over five nights, along with daily snorkeling tours. Dive in to see what room category suits you best, to experience the best of the Maldives.
  • ​Adaaran Select Huduranfushi boasts a multi faceted dining experience at its Maldives Hotel Restaurants with spectacular views accompanying almost every meal. Start the day with a breakfast buffet and enjoy ethnic dishes, international cuisine or light snacks in a variety of restaurants and cafes. Choose from a range of fresh sea food and create a meal to your liking while you enjoy the ever changing views of the Indian Ocean.
  • Indulge in a candle lit dinner or celebrate and sip a glass of wine and relax to the soothing sounds of the ocean at the Sunset Bar and Restaurant, the resort’s signature cafe. Themed buffet style meals at our distinctive Maldives Hotel restaurants offer a combination of Maldivian and international cuisines to tempt discerning tastes nightly.

packages.overview:
• Embrace the magical Indian Ocean experience from a vibrant beach or overwater villa, offering stunning ocean views. Refreshingly friendly, caring service and playfully designed spaces create a fun, free-spirited stay.
  • A fun, chilled-out balance is at the heart of the dining experience at the limited-service all day dining restaurant, Element X. Share memorable family moments over flavoursome feasts and convenient self-service beverage counters. Immerse in a multi-layered experience at the lively X360 bar – with a uniquely interactive, fun, and exuberant ambience.
  • OBLU XPERIENCE Ailafushi is a Green Globe certified resort. Sensitive handling of island ecosystems, sustainable drinking water solutions, supporting local communities, and other green initiatives are the norm here.

packages.overview:
• The Maldives is a tropical island nation located in the Indian Ocean, southwest of Sri Lanka and India. Comprising 26 atolls and over 1,000 coral islands, the Maldives is renowned for its crystal-clear turquoise waters, powdery white-sand beaches, luxurious overwater villas, and vibrant coral reefs. It is one of the world’s most sought-after honeymoon and luxury travel destinations.

  • The Maldives pioneered the concept of luxurious water villas with direct lagoon access.

  • Home to some of the most diverse and vibrant marine ecosystems, ideal for diving and snorkeling.

packages.overview:
• Medhufushi Island Resort is a heaven of peace and relaxation. An air of tranquility pervades the idyllic island which is adorned with shady coconut trees and tropical flowers. Surrounding the island is a spectacular lagoon in shades of turquoise and shimmering azure blue. If you want to get away from it all and experience affordable, laid-back rustic at a Maldives resort, you can’t find anywhere better than Medhufushi Island Resort.
  • When only pure luxury will do, Medhufushi Spa has everything you need to feel relaxed, refreshed and revived. Located over the crystal-clear water of the lagoon, this stunning spa treats its visitors to an array of indulgent experiences, from classic spa treatments to luxurious therapies inspired by the changing seasons. Combining modern and traditional therapies Medhufushi Spa is the perfect place to unwind. Our four treatment suites can be reserved and is a must-visit for honeymooners and couples looking for a truly special experience.

packages.overview:
• ​With powdery white sand beach leading out into the clear waters of the Indian Ocean, dazzling sunsets and an array of attractive dining venues, Centara Ras Fushi Resort & Spa Maldives creates a stylish yet timeless tropical escape to celebrate life’s special moments.
  • As one of the most romantic spots you could ever dream of for a wedding or vow renewal, our dedicated event team can arrange every last detail of your beachfront ceremony, complete with traditional Maldivian touches all combining to create an unforgettable experience.​

{"title":"Bhaskar Chakraborty","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-05","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

10th October 2024 we went on a trip to Meghalaya and Shillong which was arranged by Travel Exploria . All the beautiful places on our itinerary were well covered and time coordination was perfect .We were able to have a relaxing family trip and visit various tourist spots and get a taste of local cuisine and rich culture .The falls of Shillong ,lush green Meghalaya captivated us with its ethereal beauty . The highlights of our trip was forest safari at Kaziranga National Park were we saw one horned rhinoceros .Travel Exploria did an amazing job with the hotel bookings ,coordinations and tour planning. We have covered multiple international and national trips with travel Exploria since 2017 it’s always been a pleasant experience traveling with them.

overview:
Best Honeymoon Packages in India – Romantic Getaways for Newlyweds

Every love story deserves the perfect beginning—and Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency, Best Tour Operator, and Best International Tour Operator, brings you the perfect escape with our specially crafted Best Honeymoon Package. From the pristine beaches of island paradises to the snow-kissed magic of mountain getaways, our tailor-made tours promise moments that will last a lifetime.

Why Choose Honeymoon Packages in India?

Diverse Destinations – Beaches, Hills, and Heritage Sites
Choose from a rich variety of romantic destinations in India—from the sun-kissed beaches of Goa and Andaman to the serene hills of Himachal Pradesh and cultural palaces of Rajasthan. You can also explore unique international destinations such as the India to Finland Tour Package or India to Egypt Tour Package for a truly unforgettable experience. Each place offers unique experiences designed to make your honeymoon unforgettable.

Customized Experiences for Couples
Our honeymoon packages in India are customizable to match your preferences, whether it’s a private candlelight dinner, spa sessions, or adventure activities. You can also combine honeymoon packages with our best family tour packages for later travel.

Affordable Options for Every Budget
We offer honeymoon packages ranging from luxury resorts to affordable stays, ensuring couples on all budgets find their perfect match without compromising on quality.

Top Honeymoon Destinations in India

Goa – Beachfront Romance and Vibrant Nightlife
Enjoy beachside resorts, sunset cruises, and lively night markets. Our Goa honeymoon package includes private dinners and optional water sports.

Himachal Pradesh – Serene Mountains and Cozy Resorts
Explore the romantic hill stations with snow-capped peaks, forest walks, and cozy fireplaces. (Internal link suggestion: [Manali honeymoon package])

Kerala – Backwaters and Luxury Houseboats
Glide through tranquil backwaters on private houseboats, complemented by Ayurvedic spa treatments and traditional performances.

Rajasthan – Royal Palaces and Desert Adventures
Experience grandeur in Jaipur or Udaipur, with camel safaris and heritage walks adding to the magic.

Andaman Islands – Secluded Beaches and Crystal Clear Waters
Relax on pristine beaches and explore coral reefs, perfect for couples seeking privacy and natural beauty.
For couples who wish to celebrate overseas, our India to Mauritius Tour Package offers the perfect tropical escape.

Popular Honeymoon Package Types

Beach Honeymoon Packages
Featuring destinations like Maldives, Goa, Andaman, and Bali honeymoon packages, where you can enjoy sun, sand, and sea.

Hill Station Honeymoon Packages
Includes packages to Manali, Kashmir, Darjeeling, and Switzerland honeymoon packages offering serene mountain escapes.

Adventure Honeymoon Packages
For thrill-seeking couples, options include desert safaris in Rajasthan, trekking in Himachal Pradesh, or water sports in Thailand honeymoon packages.

Luxury and Wellness Honeymoon Packages
Indulge in spa retreats, private villas, and fine dining experiences, especially in the Maldives honeymoon package and Kerala honeymoon packages.

What’s Included in the Best Honeymoon Packages in India?

Romantic accommodation with special arrangements like candlelight dinners
Sightseeing tours and couple-focused activities such as spa treatments or private excursions
Airport transfers and local transportation for hassle-free travel
Personalized services including surprise gifts, photography sessions, and anniversary celebrations

Tip: Always confirm inclusions and check for any optional add-ons during booking.

Best Time to Plan Your Honeymoon in India

Ideal Seasons for Different Destinations

Beaches (Goa, Andaman): November to February for pleasant weather
Hills (Manali, Kashmir): March to June and September to November for clear skies
Cultural and Heritage sites (Rajasthan): October to March for cooler temperatures

Off-Season Deals and Benefits
Travel during off-peak seasons can offer great discounts but check weather conditions, especially for hill stations.

Frequently Asked Questions About Honeymoon Packages in India

How to choose the best honeymoon package?
Consider your preferred climate, activities, and budget. Customized family tour packages and couple packages allow flexibility.

Are honeymoon packages customizable?
Yes! We offer customized honeymoon packages tailored to your preferences and special requests.

What is the average cost of a honeymoon package in India?
Costs typically range from ₹1.2 lakh to ₹5 lakh depending on destination and package inclusions.

Are Manali honeymoon packages suitable for adventure lovers?
Yes, Manali honeymoon packages include trekking, paragliding, and river rafting options.

Can I combine a Lakshadweep honeymoon package with other island destinations?
Absolutely! Lakshadweep packages can be combined with India to Mauritius Tour Package or Andaman honeymoon packages for a diverse island experience.

Are Thailand and Vietnam honeymoon packages offered?
Yes, Thailand honeymoon packages and Vietnam honeymoon packages offer exotic beach and cultural experiences perfect for couples.

How to Book the Best Honeymoon Packages in India

Trusted Travel Agencies and Online Booking Platforms
Book with reputable agencies like Travelxploria to ensure smooth transactions and authentic experiences.

Tips for Early Booking and Discounts
Plan ahead to avail early bird offers and special packages around festivals or wedding seasons.

Essential Travel Documents and Packing Tips for Couples
Carry valid ID proofs, travel insurance, and pack according to the destination climate—don’t forget essentials for beach or hill stays.
